Derek, Last week, I vetoed legislation designed by Republicans in the Wisconsin legislature to make it even harder to vote.
This legislation would have made it hard to count absentee votes and would have erected new barriers that would greatly impact communities of color, seniors, and Wisconsinites living with disabilities.
That is why I am proud to have vetoed this fundamentally unpatriotic legislation.

name: Team AOC
subject: Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
READ: Resources and volunteer opportunities to help refugees fleeing violence in Afghanistan.
#
Many of us have been glued to the news coming out of Afghanistan today. After 20 years of war, unimaginable violence, and so many lives lost, it’s heartbreaking to see a worsening humanitarian crisis unfold before our eyes. ([**You can catch up on the news here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9377?t=1&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb).)
**Our focus now must be on the safety of the people who remain in Afghanistan** — American citizens, our allies, and those in danger of violent retribution from the Taliban.
**The U.S. has a moral obligation to the Afghan people. Our role in creating this crisis is indisputable.** Now, we must spare no time or expense in evacuating as many refugees as possible, safely and swiftly.
* * *
**If you know people in Afghanistan trying to get to safety, we are extending resources here that may help:**
* If you or someone you know is a U.S. citizen in Afghanistan that wants to leave the country, [**have them fill out this form**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9378?t=2&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb).
* If you or someone you know has an approved petition for a Special Immigrant Visa, email [**NVCSIV@state.gov**](mailto:NVCSIV@state.gov) or call 1-603-334-0828.
* If you or someone you know worked as a contractor with U.S. forces, non-governmental organizations, or the media in Afghanistan, you can [**find information on the P-2 safe passage admissions program here**.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9379?t=3&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb)

* * *
If you are in the United States and wish to help people fleeing Afghanistan, [**you can sign up here to volunteer for airport pickup, apartment setups, and/or meals for Afghans with the Lutheran Immigration and Refugee Service.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9380?t=4&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb)
After all that we have done, the bare minimum we must do is extend safe passage to as many refugees as possible, and provide support as they rebuild their lives.
In the coming days, it’s up to us to keep up the pressure on lawmakers and government officials to do right by the people of Afghanistan and open our doors in this moment of crisis.
Sincerely,
Team AOC

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb)
---|---|---
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2346%2E2526796%2EYXRcnb). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Ted Budd
subject: Joe Biden Has Caused Another Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Six weeks ago, Joe Biden said it is "highly unlikely" that the Taliban will take over Afghanistan.
---
| |
---|---|---
| Peter,

**Joe Biden has failed us once again.**

Six weeks ago, Joe Biden said it is "highly unlikely" that the Taliban will take over Afghanistan. [Look where we are now.](https://tedbudd.cmail19.com/t/r-l-trllljik-blhlumhlr-y/)

Instead of taking responsibility for his disastrous foreign policy, Joe Biden is blaming President Trump. But in June of last year, he had a different tune. This president is an embarrassment to America, and to the men and women who have sacrificed so much to defend freedom. **Joe Biden has proven repeatedly that he is incompetent and unfit to lead our country.**

It's time for a change in Washington. We must have a Senate who will hold President Biden accountable. We need it now more than ever. Thank you,

Ted Budd |

name: Friends of Judge Lori A. Dumas
subject: Working Together for a Better Future, we need your support today
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Working Together for a Better Future
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP22/1/89382/images/Headshot%20%281%29.JPG]The Honorable Lori A. Dumas understands the responsibility a Commonwealth Court judge holds as she makes decisions that affect people's lives, today and in the future. One of her values is DIVERSITY AND INCLUSIVENESS.
Judge Dumas believes that there should be a collaborative effort between the community and the courts. That's why there needs to be better representation through a more diverse Commonwealth Court. Right now, the Court lacks diversity in partisanship and color, leaving a lot of Pennsylvanians behind. If a critical case came to the Court that affected all Pennsylvanians, the current Court couldn't accurately reflect the people.
Judge Dumas is committed to improving the Court's rulings' representation and accuracy through her unique perspective as an African-American woman from Southeast Philadelphia.
Through her work with victimized children and human trafficking, Judge Dumas learned the Court work's critical nature and how it can be used for significant positive impact. She believes it's the Court's duty to protect the most vulnerable Pennsylvanians, including seniors, the impoverished, the mentally ill, minors, and other marginalized citizens.
As a Commonwealth Court judge, Judge Dumas would have the tools to make a huge difference for Pennsylvania. She could continue to help families and children by impacting the system that impacts lives, like education, healthcare, and others.
Together, we can help create a better future for Pennsylvania. Early voting for the Pennsylvania Primaries has started. Vote today!
Vote here [https://www.judgedumas2021.com/vote]https://www.facebook.com/JudgeDumas [https://www.facebook.com/JudgeDumas] https://twitter.com/JudgeDumas [https://twitter.com/JudgeDumas] https://www.instagram.com/judgedumas/ [https://www.instagram.com/judgedumas/] https://www.judgedumas2021.com/ [https://www.judgedumas2021.com/]

Right now, the Court lacks diversity in partisanship and color, leaving a lot of Pennsylvanians behind. If a critical case came to the Court that affected all Pennsylvanians, the current Court couldn't accurately reflect the people. Judge Dumas is committed to improving the Court's rulings' representation and accuracy through her unique perspective as an African-American woman from Southeast Philadelphia. Through her work with victimized children and human trafficking, Judge Dumas learned the Court work's critical nature and how it can be used for significant positive impact. She believes it's the Court's duty to protect the most vulnerable Pennsylvanians, including seniors, the impoverished, the mentally ill, minors, and other marginalized citizens. As a Commonwealth Court judge, Judge Dumas would have the tools to make a huge difference for Pennsylvania. She could continue to help families and children by impacting the system that impacts lives, like education, healthcare, and others. Together, we can help create a better future for Pennsylvania. Early voting for the Pennsylvania Primaries has started. Vote today! Vote here [ [] [] [] [] Paid for and authorized by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court. | Parents Push Back Against Uncaring School Board
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzUzOTQzNjk0Njg5NDQyNTM2JmM9YzR0NSZlPTAmYj02ODk5NzU5NzcmZD13NXo5bDhp.zvDpELC8VJ55gVml_9cSKl5lEcAnr6QCbya7fAgQ4L4)
---|---
##### August 16, 2021
On Tuesday, August 10 Brady Williamson and I traveled to Tupelo to attend the Tupelo Public School Board meeting.
Neither of us represent that area of the state but local parents asked the Mississippi Freedom Caucus for help and support as they fight for their right to make healthcare decisions for their own children. Like several other school districts across our state and our country, parents are finding school board members who are ignoring parent’s wishes and making healthcare choices for their children without the parent’s consent.
In Tupelo, a mask mandate for all children throughout the school system has been implemented without regard for the health and safety of individuals and these parents wanted to present their case against the mask mandate.
During the course of this school board meeting, I observed honest decent parents who have legitimate concerns about the health and education risk of demanding their child wear a mask all day during school. They prepared talking points and presented themselves as respectfully as possible.
But I also observed a school board who was the most arrogant and uncaring group of people I’ve seen in some time. This board showed that they cared nothing about hearing facts or all sides of an issue before making a decision. They were also extremely disrespectful of the parents, who are the very people for whom they work.
Each parent was given three minutes to make their comments, unless representing a group of people, and then they were given six minutes. The first parent to present came to the end of her six minutes but had not completed her comments. When the buzzer sounded the parent to follow offered to give up her three minutes so the first parent could finish her comments. The Board refused to allow that simple act, proving they didn’t care about what the parents were saying.
If your child is in the Tupelo Public School District, my recommendation is get them as far away from these people as possible. Your School Board does not care about your child, they do not care about you and should never be allowed to make decisions that affect your child.
Parents across Mississippi and across our nation have had enough of the bullying of their children and they have had enough of their choices for health care for their children taken away.
It is time we all take a stand and demand our rights. If someone believes a mask provides them safety then they should wear a mask but they have no right to make that decision for someone else. If the vaccine and mask are affective, then they have no reason to fear anyone who chooses not to wear a mask.
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is composed of elected officials and citizens who are tired of being ignored by government officials and bureaucrats. The Caucus supports the efforts of citizens who are fighting for freedom and liberty, and that is exactly what these parents are doing.
Our fight for freedom never ends.

---

|

---

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I lost my legs in Afghanistan. I need your help to defeat Joe Biden.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144106:6CwLyUlhN:m:1:3253819041:565D61DDD9F4E4DCD7B4CBEDEF6C9C95:r)
---
| Peter,

I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan.

Now, Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace.

I want to share with you the lessons I learned in Afghanistan, but first, I urgently need your help to defeat Joe Biden and stop his America Last agenda. Can I count on you to help?
---
| [DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144106:6CwLyUlhN:m:1:3253819041:565D61DDD9F4E4DCD7B4CBEDEF6C9C95:r "DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN")
---
| For me, this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster...

**On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. **As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America.

**That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it. **I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn't sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't.

**Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. **The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home.

**Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death.** He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind.
[**> > As a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title. If you agree, please help me defeat him and stop his disastrous America Last agenda. << **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144106:6CwLyUlhN:m:1:3253819041:565D61DDD9F4E4DCD7B4CBEDEF6C9C95:r)
**Another lesson I learned in the Army is that nobody can do it alone: we need our whole team to work together, especially when there are life or death consequences on the line. **That's why I'm determined to stay in the fight for freedom now. Even if my injury cut short my time on the battlefield in Afghanistan, I am going to keep fighting to protect my fellow soldiers and our allies.

**To do that, we must come together to defeat Joe Biden, elect more conservative veterans to Congress and restore the America First agenda that President Trump championed.**

[**So, I 'm asking: just like I relied on my fellow soldiers in Afghanistan to save my life, I need to rely on you now. Can I count on you to help?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144106:6CwLyUlhN:m:1:3253819041:565D61DDD9F4E4DCD7B4CBEDEF6C9C95:r)

name: PACT - Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: Teachers Union LAWSUIT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
They are SUING a parent for requesting to know what her child is learning.

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144217:6V3sCUluN:m:1:3253819041:17EB30851045A1355078B349B204D1E1:r)
---
Peter,

**A teacher's union is SUING a parent for daring to ask what her child is learning in school.**

_A Rhode Island chapter of the National Education Association has filed a lawsuit against a parent in order to block the release of records concerning Critical Race Theory and gender "education" in schools._

**In other words, the NEA has filed a lawsuit to keep parents in the dark about the indoctrination being forced upon their children.**

Parents Against Critical Theory (PACT) is fighting for the rights of all parents, but we need your help to come out victorious. **Would you donate today to help us take down the teachers unions and their manipulative games?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us fight back against the Teachers Unions> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144217:6V3sCUluN:m:1:3253819041:17EB30851045A1355078B349B204D1E1:r)**

| [Other](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144217:6V3sCUluN:m:1:3253819041:17EB30851045A1355078B349B204D1E1:r "###")
---

In a complaint filed in the Superior Court, the teacher's union claims that the teaching records are "private," and their release must be balanced against the "rights" of teachers.

**They are completely forgetting about the rights of parents.** We have a right to know exactly what our children are being taught in the schools that WE fund with OUR tax dollars.

_We can no longer look to our elected officials to defend us. We must take matters into our own hands and fight for change._

_Join us and the millions of parents that have had enough as we fight CRT and institutionalized racism._

**[DONATE HERE to help PACT put an end to the lawsuits and bullying. >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144217:6V3sCUluN:m:1:3253819041:17EB30851045A1355078B349B204D1E1:r)**

If we don't stand up, then no one will.

Sincerely,

Parents Against Critical Theory

[**SUPPORT PACT > >**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144217:6V3sCUluN:m:1:3253819041:17EB30851045A1355078B349B204D1E1:r)

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: Kyle is running out of time
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144405:Jo-cbUllN:m:1:3253819041:7B191EFCDC674DA298602D516CFF38A6:r)
---
| | Peter,
Last August, a mob of rioters burned down and destroyed Kenosha, Wisconsin. When they came for my son Kyle, who was there offering medical assistance to anyone who needed it, he defended himself with deadly force.
You'd think that because it was all on tape, the truth might matter, but sadly that's not the time we're living in.
Instead, he was immediately labeled a "white supremacist" vigilante based on absolutely nothing, and our corrupt media, dishonest politicians and Big Tech companies colluded to destroy his character and completely crush his ability to get the truth out.
**In less than 3 months, on November 1, his trial begins.** We will see if the truth and self-defense still matter in America, or if they can be stamped out by powerful interests who only care about rating, politics, and power.
**So simply put, Kyle needs your help and he needs it now. With help from tens of thousands of generous patriots, we've been able to pay off over $500,000 in legal costs, but we are running out of time and our costs are about to skyrocket.**
**[Please rush a donation to the official Kyle Rittenhouse Defense Fund right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144405:Jo-cbUllN:m:1:3253819041:7B191EFCDC674DA298602D516CFF38A6:r)**
---
[SUPPORT KYLE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144405:Jo-cbUllN:m:1:3253819041:7B191EFCDC674DA298602D516CFF38A6:r)

Because of the outpouring of grassroots support for Kyle we've been able to recruit an incredible team of lawyers and subject matter experts. From medical to ballistics we are covering every possible base and cannot wait to expose all of these liars who've been endlessly slandering my son.
While preparing for trial, he's also been working around the clock to finish high school and when this is all done I want to see him off to college, not a jail cell.
As his mother, I will not let him down. I will work 24/7 to ensure that he gets the legal representation that he deserves, but the truth is I can't do it without you.
**[So think for a moment as if this was your own son or brother or some other close relative fighting for his freedom, and rush a donation of anything you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144405:Jo-cbUllN:m:1:3253819041:7B191EFCDC674DA298602D516CFF38A6:r)**
Thank you for your time, I hope we can count on your support, and ask that also you spread the word to your family and friends.
Sincerely, Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Have you seen our new billboard?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
[ ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58635046:WrYM9_dAN:m:1:2068296031:87114E82B975B8CD8E4DBC8832EA9B38:r)
[ ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58635046:WrYM9_dAN:m:1:2068296031:87114E82B975B8CD8E4DBC8832EA9B38:r)
[ ](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58635046:WrYM9_dAN:m:1:2068296031:87114E82B975B8CD8E4DBC8832EA9B38:r)
Friend,

Did you see our new billboard? Ahead of the one-year anniversary of the violent riots that turned Kenosha upside down, **we unveiled three billboards in Kenosha highlighting Tony Evers ' failure to keep the public safe.**
[
**View the Billboard Here**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58635047:WrYM9_dAN:m:1:2068296031:87114E82B975B8CD8E4DBC8832EA9B38:r)
Tony Evers chose politics over public safety. Amid mass rioting and looting, he refused federal help to protect the community, sent significantly fewer troops than requested, and told people to "wear your masks and keep social distance." Law enforcement organizations even begged Evers and Mandela Barnes to "refrain from making statements specific to Kenosha," saying that their remarks were "premature, judgmental, inflammatory and only add to the anger and divisiveness of an already dangerous situation."
The violence and destruction we all saw in Kenosha last summer cannot be forgotten, and it's critical that we hold Tony Evers accountable -- but **we can 't put on the pressure without help from grassroots supporters like you, Friend.** With your support, we can make sure that Wisconsinites hear the truth about Evers' role in fanning the flames.

_**[Friend, your contributions will allow us to hold Tony Evers accountable and ensure that we can continue to put on the pressure. Can you help?](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58635046:WrYM9_dAN:m:1:2068296031:87114E82B975B8CD8E4DBC8832EA9B38:r)**_
Thank you,
Team WisGOP
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58635046:WrYM9_dAN:m:1:2068296031:87114E82B975B8CD8E4DBC8832EA9B38:r)

name: Lt. Col. Wendy Rogers
subject: Announcing the Election Integrity Caucus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE
body:
Warriors for the truth |
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)
---
| Peter,

I have an announcement!

At the Election Integrity Symposium put on by Mike Lindell in South Dakota, I had the honor of meeting patriots from around the country- many in state legislatures, like me.

And after this fantastic week, I have this to announce: there are many of us, in all 50 states, who are passionate about election integrity and committed to secure elections.

I'm Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers. I am an Arizona State Senator, fighting for election integrity in Arizona and beyond! [Please help me continue to fight for America's Audit!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)

**Those of us fighting for election integrity in America's statehouses have joined forces!**

_An Election Integrity Caucus consisting of lawmakers from all 50 states has officially been formed.

Arizona Senator Wendy Rogers, who is one of the caucus founders, made the special announcement while attending Mike Lindell's Cyber Symposium with other members of the newly formed caucus.

"I am one of the founding members of the Election Integrity Caucus that consists of legislators from all 50 states. Reminds me of the Continental Congress," Sen. Rogers tweeted. "We will meet regularly and we will talk regularly to implement the securing our elections."_
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)
---
| Of course, you know that I want Arizona's broken elections fixed. I was the sham of 2020 corrected.

But this goes beyond AZ.

I want every county, every state to audit. Let's clean up the whole thing.

To heck with Biden and Merrick Garland. They were beneficiaries of the steal; they are compromised. We need to fight them!
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)
---
| **I didn't go to South Dakota just to see the sights. I went because I am a part of a nationwide movement that is reforming our elections to remove the endemic corruption and fraud.**

But there's so much more to do. The America Last forces- those that rig the elections to their own benefit- are fighting hard. And they have the power of the Federal Government, which means we must fight back harder. [Will you help me get to the truth about this election?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)

Whether it's Milwaukee, or Atlanta, or Philadelphia, or Maricopa County... we can uncover this fraud. We can clean it up.

The Left loves fraud. They cheat like they breathe. [Help us finish this process!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)

This is a hard fight. The media will villify us, but we are right. [Join our fight and help us stop the fraud!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)

Thank you so much.

America First,
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)
---
| Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)
Arizona State Senator
Arizona's 6th Legislative District
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58144488:J_-EoUlNJ:m:1:3253819041:0AA2524E3E77D9207578BAAF5CBD64F1:r)
---
|

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: Biden’s DHS Secretary Impeached
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58143336:6A8WVUlNo:m:1:3103520637:18957E3007C6B8465BDCF83DBF45D2D0:r "Headline") Peter, **Joe Biden 's Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas is a threat to the sovereignty and security of our nation, and _I 'm have filed impeachment charges to remove him from office before he can do more harm to this nation_.** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58143336:6A8WVUlNo:m:1:3103520637:18957E3007C6B8465BDCF83DBF45D2D0:r "Biden")The top responsibility of the U.S. Federal Government is to secure our borders and protect our citizens. It is horrifyingly clear that Secretary Mayorkas is utterly incapable of doing either. As hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens invade our southern border and COVID-19 rates in border communities skyrocket, it's time patriotic Americans stand up and hold Secretary Mayorkas accountable for his dereliction of duty. **[Help me IMPEACH DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 today. Every day the Biden Border Crisis continues is another day drugs, crime, and COVID-19 terrorize our border communities and jeopardize our national security.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58143337:6A8WVUlNo:m:1:3103520637:18957E3007C6B8465BDCF83DBF45D2D0:r "Help me IMPEACH DHS Secretary
Alejandro Mayorkas by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 today. Every day the Biden Border Crisis
continues is another day drugs, crime, and COVID-19 terrorize our border communities and jeopardize our national security.")** **_The Biden-Mayorkas Border Crisis is out of control_! Alejandro Mayorkas is overseeing the complete breakdown of our sovereignty and security south of my district. He willfully refuses to maintain operational control of the border and actively encourages aliens to enter our country illegally.** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58143336:6A8WVUlNo:m:1:3103520637:18957E3007C6B8465BDCF83DBF45D2D0:r "Words")Under his direction, DHS is systematically releasing COVID-19 positive aliens into our communities, subjecting the American people to unnecessary and avoidable risks. As progressive politicians threaten us with another round of lockdowns and mandates, Mayorkas is stoking the spread of COVID-19 by swinging open the flood gates at our border! **Secretary Mayorkas is failing to faithfully uphold his oath of office and is presiding over a reckless abandonment of border security and immigration enforcement at the expense of the U.S. Constitution and the security of the United States.** The Constitution provides a system of checks and balances against corrupt, incompetent, and derelict presidential appointees, and I'm taking decisive action to hold Joe Biden and Alejandro Mayorkas accountable. **_Will you help me?_** **[I have filed Articles of Impeachment against DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to restore order and security to our border, and I'm asking you to make your immediate contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $25 today!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58143338:6A8WVUlNo:m:1:3103520637:18957E3007C6B8465BDCF83DBF45D2D0:r "I have filed Articles of Impeachment against DHS Secretary
Alejandro Mayorkas to restore order and security to our border, and I’m asking you to make your immediate contribution of $1,000, $500, $250,
$100, $50, or even $25 today!")** American patriots must rise up to take on the lawless Biden Administration and preserve our sovereignty for future generations. **[You and I must take swift and decisive action to address the Biden-Mayorkas border crisis before it's too late.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58143336:6A8WVUlNo:m:1:3103520637:18957E3007C6B8465BDCF83DBF45D2D0:r "You and I must take swift and decisive action to address the
Biden-Mayorkas border crisis before it’s too late.")** Thank you. Protecting Our Sovereignty, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58143336:6A8WVUlNo:m:1:3103520637:18957E3007C6B8465BDCF83DBF45D2D0:r "Andy
Biggs") Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5)
Chairman, House Freedom Caucus P.S. Derelict DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas oversees the complete breakdown of our sovereignty and security on our Southern Border, and I have filed Articles of Impeachment to hold him accountable. **[Help me IMPEACH Mayorkas and secure the border by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58143337:6A8WVUlNo:m:1:3103520637:18957E3007C6B8465BDCF83DBF45D2D0:r "Help me IMPEACH Mayorkas and secure the border by
making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 today.")** Thank you.

name: Defeat DeWine (via Team Cranley)
subject: Ohio NEEDS a Democratic governor in 2022.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
The Republicans will go to any lengths necessary. | Friend, We all know just what’s at stake in Ohio’s gubernatorial election. In 2020, Republicans across the country tried to _steal_ a free and fair election. Donald Trump wanted GOP-controlled legislatures to overturn the election results in their states, and it almost worked. **They proved they’ll go to any lengths necessary to preserve their power. Now, we have to prepare for the possibility that they might try it again.** Ohioans deserve to know that their votes will count, but we can’t trust Republicans to uphold election results that aren’t in their favor. **We need a Democrat we can count on to defend our democracy.** **_[John Cranley is the Democrat who can _defeat_ Mike DeWine next year, but he needs 500 grassroots donors with us in the first week of our campaign to take on the GOP. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34195405/301202807/683353327?refcode=20210817_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODAwODI2My01ZmZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjcPYpIT881HqR4TEBRa-GHSRC2S_ddW9_BsBoBrLTs=) Friend — Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand: **FIRST:** Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats. **THEN:** Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a _sweeping_ voter suppression bill so restrictive that Stacey Abrams calls it "Jim Crow 2.0." **NOW:** Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights — and _CNN_ confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first ever Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights — but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support. [**So please, friend: Will you split a donation of $10 or more between our campaign and Seth Moulton so we can work together to fight back against GOP-led voter suppression efforts, keep Georgia blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34195406/301202809/683353327?refcode=20210817_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODAwODI2My01ZmZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjcPYpIT881HqR4TEBRa-GHSRC2S_ddW9_BsBoBrLTs=) Thanks for being a part of this team. — Raphael Warnock

name: Hillsdale College
subject: Socialism rising?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58146039:6DbuIUlFN:m:1:3253819041:3E2E72906B6ED4E9FCA362DDA7A4E598:r) Dear Peter,
Two years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young.
Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country.
**Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58146039:6DbuIUlFN:m:1:3253819041:3E2E72906B6ED4E9FCA362DDA7A4E598:r)**
With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.
A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.
**Why is this?**
For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.
For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.
This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels.
_The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize.
In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed**.
By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.
We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution.
As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."
If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today.
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58146039:6DbuIUlFN:m:1:3253819041:3E2E72906B6ED4E9FCA362DDA7A4E598:r)**
In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 29, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6DbuIUlFN). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6DbuIUlFN)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I am facing multiple opponents in this upcoming election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BHJa5acaojjSabW1A0hEMZZ8IjGR3IPKxBHpVvelilQ=/44v_yxeJntqcOuyPwmFTWoAVGwhWH6-hQp7toi_JFQ8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210817-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

When I flipped my seat in 2018, I was the first Democrat elected to represent Virginia's 7th District since 1968. Thanks to a dedicated grassroots effort, we reached every corner of the district and won by a slim margin. In 2020, the race was just as close, but our campaign's immense support allowed me to win re-election.

Now, we are focusing on 2022. Multiple opponents have declared their candidacy to challenge me in 2022, because of the close margins in this seat:
---
| | **Republicans look to midterms for chance to unseat Spanberger in 7th Congressional District**

_-Richmond Times-Dispatch_
---
| [SUPPORT ABIGAIL ](https://act.myngp.com/el/BHJa5acaojjSabW1A0hEMZZ8IjGR3IPKxBHpVvelilQ=/44v_yxeJntqcOuyPwmFTWoAVGwhWH6-hQp7toi_JFQ8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210817-1-EM&amount=25)
---
We know that we will face misrepresentations, distortions, and lies about my record from my many opponents. But I remain confident and energized because I know what is on the line with this election, and I know that you all know it too. With your support, I can counteract their attacks and ensure people across Central Virginia know I am committed to moving this country forward.

[_**I wouldn 't ask if this wasn't so important, Peter. We know my race in 2022 will likely be as close as the first two, so I hope you'll consider contributing today to provide us with the resources necessary to win.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/BHJa5acaojjSabW1A0hEMZZ8IjGR3IPKxBHpVvelilQ=/44v_yxeJntqcOuyPwmFTWoAVGwhWH6-hQp7toi_JFQ8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210817-1-EM&amount=25)

I hope to continue this critical work by defeating my opponents and winning re-election in 2022. Thank you, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit =. | If you wish to receive fewer emails, =. =

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Child Tax Credit round two
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

**Last week, the second round of Child Tax Credit payments went out to American families as part of the American Rescue Plan, the $1.9 trillion stimulus package passed by Democrats in Congress and signed by President Biden in March.**
Under the plan, nearly every family in the United States will receive between $3,000 and $3,600 for each child under the age of 18. That means millions of children will be lifted out of poverty — cutting child poverty in half. This is an enormous triumph for working families.
But the vote on the American Rescue Plan also showcased a stark difference between Democratic and Republican priorities. While Democrats voted yes on the bill, _every single Republican voted no._
**House Republicans claim to be the party of working people. But when it came time for them to prove it by voting to support millions of American families, they showed their true colors.**
Passing legislation that makes peoples’ lives tangibly better — like the American Rescue Plan — is exactly why I came to Congress. But if I’m going to keep doing work like this, I’ll need to win re-election, and the House Democratic majority will need to be preserved. That’s why I have to ask:
**[Can you make a contribution today to support my re-election campaign so I can keep fighting on behalf of working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34203322/301222100/-376196102?refcode2=b18efa7d-6aff-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210817-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMThlZmE3ZC02YWZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UsnwmQUdGtUh21h1QPnLXqhmCoSiSNGPOyMqQCRiWEk=)**
Thank you for reading, and thank you for your support. I am so grateful for the opportunity to work on once-in-a-generation legislation to fight poverty, and I am so proud to serve you in Congress.
All my best,
Mondaire

body:

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK
body:
Friends, After two decades and the loss of thousands of American lives, the precipitous deterioration of this situation has left many of us with more questions than answers.

| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkYlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRGVtYWlsJTJCbG9nbyUyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW0lM0RtZXNzYWdlJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNEQWZnaGFuaXN0YW4lMkJFbWFpbA==&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=533A731A1A10600)
---
| | Friends-

I am heartbroken by the events taking place in Afghanistan.

After two decades and the loss of thousands of American lives, the precipitous deterioration of this situation has left many of us with more questions than answers.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=533A731A1A10601)
---
| | |
---
| | Most Americans agree that it is time for our military men and women to come home, but this needed to be accomplished in a thoughtful and strategic fashion. As we approach the 20th anniversary of September 11, 2001, a hotbed for terrorist activity has now been created in the Middle East.

We need to know what information Joe Biden received from the intelligence community that led him to make the decision to hastily withdraw American troops from Afghanistan and if he followed the recommendations of his foreign policy and national security advisors.

We also need to know why he didn't establish a functioning visa process for the Afghan interpreters and our partners who are most at risk under the brutal Taliban regime prior to withdrawal.

Many military advisors warned that a swift removal of U.S. troops could lead to the same terrorist threats our country saw more than 20 years ago. The President's apparent disregard for their concerns has now led to an unmitigated national security disaster.

---
| | |
---
| | More American troops are currently in Afghanistan than when Biden announced the United States' withdrawal, all while our southern border remains wide open for anyone to enter our country illegally.

---
| | |
---
| | Last month, Biden said a Taliban takeover in Afghanistan was 'highly unlikely,' that the Afghan government had 'all the tools, training and equipment of any modern military' to keep themselves in power.

Clearly, the Administration got it wrong and Joe Biden must take ownership for this foreign policy failure.

clean_body: Friends, After two decades and the loss of thousands of American lives, the precipitous deterioration of this situation has left many of us with more questions than answers. | | | | | | Friends- I am heartbroken by the events taking place in Afghanistan. After two decades and the loss of thousands of American lives, the precipitous deterioration of this situation has left many of us with more questions than answers. | | | | | | | | | | Most Americans agree that it is time for our military men and women to come home, but this needed to be accomplished in a thoughtful and strategic fashion. As we approach the 20th anniversary of September 11, 2001, a hotbed for terrorist activity has now been created in the Middle East. We need to know what information Joe Biden received from the intelligence community that led him to make the decision to hastily withdraw American troops from Afghanistan and if he followed the recommendations of his foreign policy and national security advisors. We also need to know why he didn't establish a functioning visa process for the Afghan interpreters and our partners who are most at risk under the brutal Taliban regime prior to withdrawal. Many military advisors warned that a swift removal of U.S. troops could lead to the same terrorist threats our country saw more than 20 years ago. The President's apparent disregard for their concerns has now led to an unmitigated national security disaster. | | | | | More American troops are currently in Afghanistan than when Biden announced the United States' withdrawal, all while our southern border remains wide open for anyone to enter our country illegally. | | | | | Last month, Biden said a Taliban takeover in Afghanistan was 'highly unlikely,' that the Afghan government had 'all the tools, training and equipment of any modern military' to keep themselves in power. Clearly, the Administration got it wrong and Joe Biden must take ownership for this foreign policy failure. Sincerely, | | | | Nicole Malliotakis U.S. Representative | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

name: Natalie Monteiro
subject: Can you join our Pennsylvania launch call on August 26?
body:
Pennsylvania: It’s time to get to work!

| | Friend, **I want to start this message by introducing myself. I’m Natalie Monteiro, the Pennsylvania Organizing Manager for NextGen America.** For the past couple of years, I’ve helped move the progressive agenda forward at a national level as a volunteer, manager, and a digital organizer. I’m so excited to be a part of NextGen but even more excited to work with you all! I look forward to the many goals we can and will achieve together! [Can I count on you to join our launch call at 6:30 p.m. ET on Thursday, August 26? RSVP here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34206557/301238099/-2081679945?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFlZTcyYi03NGZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u6tS__EZA1sv2SE-cBzG8tGSIvKs4ObR0NBB8F9CQlg=&emci=d6550db8-75fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac1ee72b-74ff-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) In 2020, NextGen volunteers helped President Biden secure his victory and take back the Senate. You stepped into leadership roles within your communities to register voters in the middle of a global pandemic. You participated in phone banks and texted voters to get out the vote. You showed up to defend President Biden’s victory in the face of disinformation, lies, and intimidation. Now, in 2021, almost a year after electing Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House, we need you to show up again. As our state prepares for the redistricting process, we are building a network of volunteers like you across Pennsylvania to register voters, hold our elected officials accountable, and build power ahead of the 2022 midterm elections. This call will be an opportunity to meet other volunteer leaders across the state and learn more about how you can get involved. [Please join us for our statewide launch call at 6:30 p.m. ET on Thursday, August 26.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34206558/301238129/647203410?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFlZTcyYi03NGZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u6tS__EZA1sv2SE-cBzG8tGSIvKs4ObR0NBB8F9CQlg=&emci=d6550db8-75fc-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ac1ee72b-74ff-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) In solidarity, Natalie Monteiro
Pennsylvania Organizing Manager

Fellow Conservative,

Do you know how many black women currently serve in the House of Representatives? **26 black women and they are ALL Democrats.**

**It’s no wonder leading Democrats, like President Joe Biden feel comfortable saying _“You ain’t black”_ if you vote red** - we haven’t proven to black female Americans that they have a voice in Washington through the Republican Party.

My name is Aja Smith. I am a proud black female American, United States Air Force veteran and [**I’m running for Congress to put Democrats on notice to let them know that there IS a place for African Americans in the party of Lincoln.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=befbdd13c66445c2a5ffee2a7cb00e31&_e=sZLrYne8ILT19uj0qxssYJ8XE_Lyc3ULPchMlzNempAgMc4eMKt1UjoylXfjSJH4_07XRmeNLGpptZxkTQIXbQgTjRYiRjzsZqbG7vghziy6qADUJr1CDCjt6oMK44yUmFFliv4tLLrXJcgm2eYI8I9Dsp2HMh7Vl-knY4HlDhn18KgmFSke05Z95v3KBu-izTGzC_KwVQBI-340X7oXpw-hsApgTbtH36Da9bmCa-B3HhizCDN-QIWWmRELs8dLxcr_riSmTcpBPj7sG9m_tHF9DBIizT71XgBrlX3wcA8PNJN8U6NL9g-e4ry8_8Nffjb_-jsEFRX1gkp_Uy17-NlMqbZTxv9OjLztQzzXIeIv1dF-Vlb2vfyaQVD0N2-kf7G3WtgKMCTwjyKcTKPYU0hlAx3Xh4MwhgnoULq-zCb0EUI0B1qT-LWVgITxuFW1) We are NOT an anomaly.

[**Send A Black Conservative
Female to Congress ✈ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=befbdd13c66445c2a5ffee2a7cb00e31&_e=sZLrYne8ILT19uj0qxssYJ8XE_Lyc3ULPchMlzNempAgMc4eMKt1UjoylXfjSJH4_07XRmeNLGpptZxkTQIXbQgTjRYiRjzsZqbG7vghziy6qADUJr1CDCjt6oMK44yUmFFliv4tLLrXJcgm2eYI8I9Dsp2HMh7Vl-knY4HlDhn18KgmFSke05Z95v3KBu-izTGzC_KwVQBI-340X7oXpw-hsApgTbtH36Da9bmCa-CW2QxkL1AgnoytmosrqsScRquZ-OQteqglt_lqlceFfJ5c6NprNNzijpWh4yoFwh4FCszL2bL_mpTaYYqTjaYU9qmFzmrynsqNKQAfYezh3hQ5XK6c5umrBXq1FF96XjdaqkkIPdiuleWm5Kw0z06BMPbcSMkxuU38_4EzsrpHvp0Wi1diAYgG3X_ZsK4e4Y1CvR1BqJOdk-gBTgc3h1v0)
If I win my targeted House race, I can show every American, including Democrats, that ethnicity should not dictate your political party and black females are allowed to step out of line and think for themselves.

Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... We didn’t have the resources to take on the Democrat Machine that dedicated countless resources to silence and defeat us.

That's why although the Midterm Election seems far away, [**I need every proud patriot to support my campaign immediately, so that when the Democrats come after me for being a black Republican female, which they will, I will be prepared to take them on and win.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=befbdd13c66445c2a5ffee2a7cb00e31&_e=sZLrYne8ILT19uj0qxssYJ8XE_Lyc3ULPchMlzNempAgMc4eMKt1UjoylXfjSJH4_07XRmeNLGpptZxkTQIXbQgTjRYiRjzsZqbG7vghziy6qADUJr1CDCjt6oMK44yUmFFliv4tLLrXJcgm2eYI8I9Dsp2HMh7Vl-knY4HlDhn18KgmFSke05Z95v3KBu-izTGzC_KwVQBI-340X7oXpw-hsApgTbtH36Da9bmCa-DCKKOg-4Wz-zpSb804OaTcEzIk8kswZBv8ACRzdfGwLhJT1gIc8651gbp2ODgTl351X3lr22FUBEQmmGvxeHB9EUQX0Iy7k8kgZZt8CyEeWQfUYD9hRUl160qiZc0gTeT6kLTv2xTwFPuaGQ0jxXfYfRI9sYhyuXVV63oRXk6pdk4IOzioUtDUwxon4y9pyxVMysFFYXLZlC-kGsJkAYVP)

clean_body: Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... | Fellow Conservative, Do you know how many black women currently serve in the House of Representatives? 26 black women and they are ALL Democrats. It’s no wonder leading Democrats, like President Joe Biden feel comfortable saying “You ain’t black” if you vote red - we haven’t proven to black female Americans that they have a voice in Washington through the Republican Party. My name is Aja Smith. I am a proud black female American, United States Air Force veteran and We are NOT an anomaly. We can change the Democrats’ narrative, break their chains in the black community and take back the House in 2022, If I win my targeted House race, I can show every American, including Democrats, that ethnicity should not dictate your political party and black females are allowed to step out of line and think for themselves. Last cycle, we had numerous black female Republicans run for the House. But there was a reason none of them won, including myself... We didn’t have the resources to take on the Democrat Machine that dedicated countless resources to silence and defeat us. That's why although the Midterm Election seems far away, Fellow Conservative, you need to understand how important my candidacy truly is for the Republican Party. It’s not only about taking back the House, but also about making history in America. With your help, I can become the FIRST black female Republican elected to the House from California. We can change the course of history through THIS race! So, Fellow Conservative, what do you say? Are you going to stand with me and be a part of one of the most important races in the Midterm Election? Thank you, Aja Smith United States Air Force Veteran Republican for Congress | Aja is a United States Air Force veteran. name: Michael Bennet
subject: the "accidental Senator"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Can I explain something, folks? In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. And it’s true, I had never run for office before. But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate, fighting for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. And thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all. But now we’re up for re-election. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear Mitch McConnell has his sights set on Colorado. To make matters worse, we’re way behind our fundraising goal for the month. **We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to split $10 or more between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s to help us reach our August fundraising goal and fight back?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34207821/301243381/-944448124?refcode=e20210817_mfb&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTc4OGRmMi03NWZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NuMQbDH34NfvmgpPZ7-qukl05Ki4dPADY-oSGkof3cA=)

name: Team Bass
subject: Code red for humanity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello --

It's official. The Dixie Fire is now the largest single fire in California history, covering nearly 900 square miles. More than 6,000 firefighters are currently tackling this fire, and thousands of people have had to evacuate their homes.

Each year has brought us increasingly larger and more destructive wildfires due to historic drought conditions and warmer temperatures. On top of that, our communities are facing extreme storms, deadly heat waves, and rising sea levels.

**We aren 't going to avoid saying it: climate change is here.**

Karen is working to secure resources to help vulnerable Californians get the resources they need to face this growing threat. And she's fighting for cleaner, more cost-effective energy in the House.

Just last week, the United Nations issued a "code red for humanity." The UN's report warns that unless we make rapid, large-scale reductions in greenhouse gas emissions _right now_ , the global temperature will continue to rise.

Californians have already experienced devastating loss because of climate change -- loss of homes, precious habitats, resources, and life. It's time Congress tackles the climate crisis head-on and faces this existential threat.

**[Add your name now to join Karen in demanding Congress tackle the climate crisis. We need leaders to unite NOW to save our planet from irreparable harm.](https://act.myngp.com/el/bGkBLZccD-vVzKR0jPYVWMUGvT1rcZp8KM7MRUA1Jg0=/OUKZKvdvveAvQ_MOVeGI8CO7hix2o2wdWCetV9sOBX0=?gpsid=39_132_20139&ms=em21_210817_clmt_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210817_clmt_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210817_clmt_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

In solidarity,

Team Bass

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/bGkBLZccD-vVzKR0jPYVWMUGvT1rcZp8KM7MRUA1Jg0=/zthxxYAp4Z2OM3tn2yNYga8xWC6EsHg3vPpUOF5g2_Q=?gpsid=39_132_20109&refcode=em21_210817_clmt_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210817_clmt_adv_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

Fellow American,

**It’s Mark McCloskey writing to you to convey a message from the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump**. Last week, President Trump issued a statement of congratulations to the Missouri governor, Mike Parson, as well as to my wife Patty and me. Did you happen to read about it?

I know that most of you aren’t likely to receive Missouri news updates, so I’ve copy and pasted President Trump’s statement below:

_"Congratulations to Governor Mike Parson of Missouri for having the courage to give Mr. and Mrs. Mark McCloskey a full pardon. They were defending their property and if they had not done what they did, their property would have been completely destroyed and they would have been badly beaten, or dead – great going Mike"_

Fellow American, Patty and I couldn’t be more thrilled that the President has offered his congratulations to both my wife and me, as well as to the Governor. Both President Trump and Gov. Parson, from the very beginning, demonstrated their wholehearted support of us when faced with the onslaught of the mob last year. Their sincere support for us and the rule of law is a constant reminder of what this country has lost as a result of the last election.

**I sincerely miss President Trump’s leadership, his candor, and his indefatigable efforts to make America GREA** T.

**While I’m certainly not comparing myself to President Trump in any way** , I believe we’re cut from similar cloth. I’m running for the United States Senate from Missouri in order to help keep President Trump’s legacy alive. Washington is stocked full of “RINOS” and progressive Democrats who have no desire to preserve our freedom and liberty. **[On this occasion of President Trump’s congratulatory remarks- I ask you to consider a contribution to my Senate campaign in any amount you can spare.](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=3d49b1d694c7466680457e2f04c09ceb&_e=8Dl_-X6lkjW8WBDn0JUeJ7MhW8x6YZgRLT8AvIPFnqn0aTz3tqKHnG7IWOAbeCu_cgXUzswdUijCHKzNZTn1xdVxPZmryibDHplxRY0DkW4LAKu5d2siG_xJLqiPV0a65VU8_HGRCVq4Qn8lEf3PjEwJRe1sdTA4GXvP3VS1dzCLWninQCGNufVZ42b4Iahfk47CAEx2q518ERpubdo5yHvLv48YIfLTjrkNQpO0bDNRxkP9Yps48mIrG7wFqGZXB6_qIolNiHOG_BYrQnSaBaC5uKwodXvQKbFO-NKVP4oh0Potsv8K_tcZIvXyj9YM28BpkrEjSTfptKaB6B9csRmMP456xyf84sv7Tv9LatdqmHKtlHC4vymR_9Jv9sVa8-16Z8YEpTVpjMwbOdRY-vDqQNbtmqcRsk3nFwEO0eWp7xXqPIkCtg9kbov0vjrXs6CvG8ff00GVdP_11do0ma7Jx8XPkMIyuyfzca3uyx8%3D)**

We need to restore sanity to Washington, and it starts by electing one conservative at a time.

For a better America,

Mark McCloskey
True conservative for United States Senate

Trump. Last week, President Trump issued a statement of congratulations to the Missouri governor, Mike Parson, as well as to my wife Patty and me. Did you happen to read about it? I know that most of you aren’t likely to receive Missouri news updates, so I’ve copy and pasted President Trump’s statement below: "Congratulations to Governor Mike Parson of Missouri for having the courage to give Mr. and Mrs. Mark McCloskey a full pardon. They were defending their property and if they had not done what they did, their property would have been completely destroyed and they would have been badly beaten, or dead – great going Mike" Fellow American, Patty and I couldn’t be more thrilled that the President has offered his congratulations to both my wife and me, as well as to the Governor. Both President Trump and Gov. Parson, from the very beginning, demonstrated their wholehearted support of us when faced with the onslaught of the mob last year. Their sincere support for us and the rule of law is a constant reminder of what this country has lost as a result of the last election. I sincerely miss President Trump’s leadership, his candor, and his indefatigable efforts to make America GREA T. While I’m certainly not comparing myself to President Trump in any way , I believe we’re cut from similar cloth. I’m running for the United States Senate from Missouri in order to help keep President Trump’s legacy alive. Washington is stocked full of “RINOS” and progressive Democrats who have no desire to preserve our freedom and liberty. We need to restore sanity to Washington, and it starts by electing one conservative at a time. For a better America, Mark McCloskey True conservative for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: You won’t believe what happened in Pennsylvania.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=081721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=081721]

Dear Friend,

Pennsylvania became the site of a great big, foul fight in the days following Tuesday, November 3, 2020.

First, the sorest loser in American history asked the U.S. Supreme Court to throw out valid ballots here in Pennsylvania. Denied.

He claimed he won Pennsylvania and that the election was a fraud. False.

He sued to stop the certification of the election results in Pennsylvania before our election workers were even done counting votes, accusing Allegheny County and Philadelphia of receiving and processing nearly 700K mail-in and absentee ballots without review by political parties and candidates. Total horseshit.

His supporters threatened our local election workers with physical harassment and death threats. Criminal.

Legislators have since tried to force unauthorized private ballot audits and attempted to put in place nefarious rules to restrict voters’ rights. Unacceptable.

That show pony knew he lost -- the sole purpose of these outcries was to sow doubt in future elections.

We at Keystone Progress Education Fund are preparing for those next attacks on our democracy by empowering communities and allaying fears through training sessions, outreach, mobilization, and registration efforts.

We may not be able to change their actions, but we can protect our votes. Your donation today will help us create a more secure election tomorrow.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=081721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=081721]

Thank you,

Keystone Progress Education Fund

name: Jim Banks, Chairman
subject: I'm disgusted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58147560:JLCRhUlNy:m:1:3253819041:FAA894CB5BFE7331778069EBA676439A:r) Peter, As an Afghanistan combat veteran and a member of the House Armed Services committee, I am truly disgusted with what Joe Biden has allowed to happen. Thousands of American soldiers like myself, fought in Afghanistan to defend our nation and secure freedom for the men, women and children of that country. Joe Biden has undone **ALL of that**. Instead of listening to the intelligence, the Biden administration ordered a hasty, unplanned evacuation that would only lead to the Taliban taking back over. The terrible images we have seen from Afghanistan are something that will never be forgotten. **_This would not have happened under President Trump 's watch._**
We need answers from the Biden administration **NOW.** [**Will you stand with me and hold the Biden administration accountable, Peter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58147561:JLCRhUlNy:m:1:3253819041:FAA894CB5BFE7331778069EBA676439A:r) [**DEMAND ANSWERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58147560:JLCRhUlNy:m:1:3253819041:FAA894CB5BFE7331778069EBA676439A:r) This utter failure in leadership must not go unnoticed. It has become clear that Joe Biden is simply not capable of leading our nation for another 3 years. [**Stand with House Conservatives and myself and demand accountability. >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58147561:JLCRhUlNy:m:1:3253819041:FAA894CB5BFE7331778069EBA676439A:r) Thank you, Jim Banks Chairman, House Conservatives Fund _JIM BANKS IS A MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY RESERVES. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE._ _Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF 's current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today._ House Conservatives Fund [Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58147562:JLCRhUlNy:m:1:3253819041:FAA894CB5BFE7331778069EBA676439A:r).

NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Chris Palombi
subject: Police officers don’t deserve this hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palombi for Congress Contributions to Palombi for Congress are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes
body:
Leftist billionaire George Soros just gave a massive donation to the radical anti-police group, Color of Change PAC.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Palombi for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw) Leftist billionaire George Soros just gave a massive donation to the radical anti-police group, Color of Change PAC.

Their sister group, Color of Change, wants to defund police departments across the country.

You and I know that's crazy and extremely dangerous.

You see, I'm a five-year veteran of the U.S. Capitol Police.

My name is Chris Palombi. I'm running for Congress in Maryland's fifth district.

[**And I am asking for your help so I can get to Washington and stop this madness.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)

[**Can I count on you to give a critically important $12 right now to help reach 400 voters?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)
I'm proud I got to protect and serve the Representatives, Senators, their staffers, and voters who came to Capitol Hill between 2007 and 2012.

And what I'm about to tell you makes my blood boil!

A member of the Color of Change staff said that, "**Capitol Police are actually members of a massive hate group** - the Fraternal Order of Police."

And now radical, anti-law and order groups and their elected Democrat allies **are pulling out all the stops to defund police, hamstring police, and turn our cities over to mobs who burn, loot, and murder**.

My opponent, Nancy Pelosi's righthand man, Steny Hoyer, is part of the problem.

You see, he co-sponsored the disastrous Justice In Policing Act that will hamstring police officers and put you, me, our families, our friends, and our fellow Americans in even greater danger than before.

In fact, just two months ago, Hoyer took to the floor of the House during National Police Week.

He said he appreciated police officers...but then closed with his sale pitch for the Justice in Policing Act, **that will get more police officers and everyday Americans killed!**
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)
As you can see, Steny Hoyer needs to lose on Election Day.

**And I can beat him.**

Right now, I'm filming powerful videos to reach and persuade voters.

And I've launched a comprehensive grassroots outreach effort. Block walking, door knocking, phone calling, talking to voters, persuading them, and getting them to turn out on Election Day.

But as you can imagine, funding all of this is going to be expensive.

[**Patriot, that 's why I ask you to give your very best gift of a critical $12 or more immediately.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)

For every $12 you give, I will be able to reach 400 voters. For $24 I will be able to reach 800 voters and so on.

I can't do it without you.

But with your vital help, I can beat Steny Hoyer.

[**Your crucially important gift of $12 or whatever you can afford now will help fully fund my voter outreach program here in Maryland.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)

And you can send a patriotic police veteran to Capitol Hill.

Please give right away. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Chris Palombi
Republican Candidate for Congress, Maryland District 5
U.S. Capitol Police veteran, 2007-2012
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vhYTlmx136KEIvHDelw9qg/pD1vUgplH763P89214ifzj8FYw)

subject: TAKE ACTION to BAN CRT
body:
_**“So God created man in his own image, in the image of God he created him; male and female he created them.”**_ _**– Genesis 1:27**_ The image of God. That’s what defines humanity, gives us our worth and value, and makes us unique. The image of God. NOT our race. Yet, Critical Race Theory is a burgeoning attack by the radical Left to divide us, and it’s aimed at our students. [TAKE ACTION TODAY](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/CSeIRh7-meDlInosaPGGQA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRi_~~) by urging the Georgia General Assembly to BAN CRITICAL RACE THEORY FROM OUR SCHOOLS! Governor Kemp has taken action against CRT. So has the Board of Education. However, only the legislature has the authority to pass a LAW against the teaching of Critical Race Theory – the idea that our race, not our shared status as image bearers, is what should define who we are. [TELL OUR LEGISLATURE THAT YOU EXPECT ACTION IN THE 2022 LEGISLATIVE SESSION.](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/CSeIRh7-meDlInosaPGGQA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRi_~~) Frontline Policy Action is working to make certain that making our children feel as though they are inherently oppressed or inherently oppressors – based on their race – NEVER takes root in Georgia. With the session still months away, there is much legwork still to do. But, we need your legislator to know that this is a priority issue for you that cannot be ignored! **[CLICK HERE OR AT THE LINKS ABOVE TO USE OUR BRAND NEW ACTION CENTER TO URGE A LEGISLATIVE BAN ON CRT!](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/CSeIRh7-meDlInosaPGGQA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRi_~~)** Critical Race Theory is a direct attack on God’s Design, an undermining of our values, a Marxist ideology, and a tool to divide us.
