name: John Castorani
subject: 5 questions from an Afghanistan veteran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
As a veteran of the Afghanistan war running for Congress, I'm curious to know what you think of Biden's botched withdrawalToday I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLDW5ZmYZcIg_w_TSpd-SSneAPtj34FIZXhcoutUeq6O6bKksKHFbAJ2QsvBWZKb8MI9nAKYVpISwtP4T0vVFIv_XpVBt5AJi9P2EE6IWBGAvE1KSs2UypYzCsbXZqYuuR-T4jDkG5_jtEa52UnyZlj3RQlUuTZ3FCGrIoy4QrokejnDBmTEkVn0slOxJIRJF_TdUPGiOJIbsL2QLSEZIxEkJbTqiEBER6_CG2iZcQ5aL4%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My heart is heavy this morning as I write this email to you. As a veteran of the Army and the United States intelligence community **who deployed to Afghanistan 3 times** over the course of nine years, I’m watching in horror as desperate families cling to U.S. military aircraft in hopes of finding safe haven from the Taliban.

**I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withdrawal, I mean it**. President Biden clearly misled the American public in July when he said that “ _**There’s going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the United States embassy**_.”

But what angers me more is that I know men like me, who serve in our special forces, will bear the brunt of Biden’s decision to pull out of Afghanistan in such a reckless manner. How do I know? **Because I spent six years tracking down the Islamic terrorists who killed our Ambassador in Benghazi, Libya on September 11th, 2012 while Hillary Clinton slept.**

**This is not a withdrawal; this is an abandonment leading to a humanitarian crisis of the likes we have not seen this century**. My heart is breaking for my brothers that I lost on the battlefield, **and for the members of the special forces who are going to be responsible for cleaning up this mess in the near future**.

This crisis perfectly sums up why I’m running for Congress, and today **[I'm hoping you'll take a few moments out of your day to answer a few questions I've been trying to answer for myself over the past week.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLDEVkfKKO-IvaNBWE9H8FBnT2IZi82Wj8yWZCDMZrX0OP0eSHdPBgHCKgjZ9-kVrwLU1Qd7gUAQa2JP_3Eyj737p7GX7glUEY1qDmhShN4umX9f2ggqmuLyOJRAWzhyt0H12k5xS6lAjbU2BEhFzkdXQXUcs6JuGpDcWJd905faLSnvzbWHi-OCpsgzPZXSjuP848NEz3SdUk8PULvL0iN7MMUyZERIm-byOfuWZjjUiE%3D)**
| [**BOTCHED WITHDRAWAL OR ABANDONMENT?
LET ME KNOW WHERE DO YOU STAND? ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLDwjZY6B2sBdbKPVmlhfJsWlgQs-8Yts3xDxXlZxPnnLZHSHCLJDG1G5GS4iiA5i9DaiwjlYsbqwq74C3n_BpUU2jftTyFaRGhQbxxt22Wm2h8IVqvr68CbQI29JLUFaHQNzpiHfkskZohzcDixgdQ2U2QR61a21Q_KFRfsG_HBNY2911FigykG_igSaTJ4wNv9-IYDd92jBjYEld6ZMWzjgP-oEZl46pGSAlz3tlj200%3D)
---

I don’t have to run for Congress, I’ve got a great job and a newborn son at home. But this absolute shit storm that Biden created should keep us all up at night.**I’ve interrogated Taliban terrorists at Bagram Airfield, I can tell you on good authority that Biden was well aware that something like this could happen**.
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLD2eYEiBPN0gG95BUAkQLwTIHBBjPDEWx2hzeUL0yo9lbaGRWxhfgHI8BaT65AjsIcGGU7ZYs-Q0EWtzm7sIBIQAjZO8425XTLECSpHDTp-iLXMF34pNVYbFjVpfHSih2b20XWL47ysGj3uEVcnNQcndsqbYUHuCx9D9dI10JEljLEB816iaXZCF_TncBXOmOMcG-JC5vrO79DFUYebhwbN2qYuj8U6EbMuQFdjX8BOsw%3D)
An article in the Wall Street Journal summed up the situation rather succinctly saying, “ _**The jihadists the U.S. toppled 20 years ago for sheltering Osama bin Laden will not fly their flag over the U.S. Embassy building on the 20th anniversary of 9/11**_.”

**The Taliban’s advances come as no surprise to us veterans of the Afghanistan conflict, I personally have deployed to Afghanistan 3 times during both my time in the Army and within the Intelligence Community**. We all knew that the Afghan National Army and Uniformed Police was an ineffective fighting force propped by U.S. logistics, U.S. air support and U.S. funding. Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "**leader** " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. **Mr. President, the blood is on your hands**.

Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. **This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel**.
[**BOTCHED WITHDRAWAL OR ABANDONMENT?
LET ME KNOW WHERE DO YOU STAND? ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLDw-hITqfKRUbaYTYl1nzDjmYKaqMrWNREmM0pA9EKLB07GqWsMQ-981Enwqv7RwYuICAee-MGNHFSXYFgueF6R42a6te2vpZliFKmzsBWx-0g0hP5Tc6nSykWzWq8H4NFG5KVCtMtanArKmddnETNyFhHjGDWFDRCd0FQyW7yYZQAO28YLTtlHM_mTvj2LwUcuYTRK64Y4zdi9-nlUKfEiXP-2MR7p9boEFFutdwi-b4%3D)
---

**Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need**. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that “ _The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions_.”

Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we’re seeing unfold today. **President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have**.

**[Today I’m asking you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress, because I assure you that if I’m given the opportunity to serve, I’ll make sure Biden and Pelosi are held to account for these foolish decisions](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLDSc88h9hu0kliEJ9X6qOz-WOwhfA6YHh2eT_HGxpy78OJKfrK_h-4pLEfZAl2CI2BqeQ0MgIVo7qM9suY0MhIn9m_j7kKLN8WIxVwyyQHDok1quICArDWpOkOwvzjCUhEvuBuP73B8fMzjH7kqsMmBBAgQK0gyUXRm8Y0SsLqCTeYJu-diCOI5IA_kRRCSncZu3snAMKzSLLO3xkfcjJ64-x_SA47DZwaAlY67xgfyQo%3D)**.
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLDm93-hiUB66dLR_p_sSKz-4FKFYAswT64xfj6nOe1As54ov9GO0pQ3WRCTGqA7NzQGyyUxyegYYEHNQG2q-sRmXcRVvroY3V6Xk2r8Eznl7BCaWhYlYWiMlCmN_9qtkSieix0W33_f4n4Hw8O2q-VnRLjsN7HChOuMzuI8nOTVFS6ZWVzusdH2RIq3ieg5LTibo-Ae4RyP299JTfA8vtwd4gLh9EXumRyj1zbfOgIPLQ%3D) [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLD2CQDH6XP-zUL20OZ25voABu2zZgTed2Umbgz-HmBArDRAVHDdoLyZGDTU-61i1xnlUtIBXc9cYUDE0ek5NhWX7N_CcI4oqHamGUopiCpjhnAANpTwl0rW7X_Xi-maVop1wPlMRENnb1KqThdgGuEwErTiJLQaW0IOieP2PSxQEMrAtgzv3RSpmen-QXOsXwbVa1rakBDdVndlYW_fQ2-50ED2yWGSTKSqOfXNM9F5ys%3D) [**BOTCHED WITHDRAWAL OR ABANDONMENT?
LET ME KNOW WHERE DO YOU STAND? ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=91a8bc4a518b49eb9825d887c0886d08&_e=m5RbCpLXvJrCZMN2WpV643dOoK3BkeEfuExtzVLO9Iif2xmMn_oqvn4cHv5lBv5yNMlWxSTw_WwbRQ7mUzTKo2l5iZzCY1xmMlY0YiJM-Ah-Cmc9ZpLkyvY8AshYEkSPmeYLusOsraLSBfGsc-YIDMdjJ3qHqRJqQwvR2l7N9Qbix2IDwQmZRM87aBwRpsXt-8hGE-dHm22xPIHxI5KJOS8x7giRjYBLoVxDgLp0rgTwCUi8pTu1XzejYOdVqr1cL4JBZpn50f-lJC0k-Y7F0oj_j-rofhaFc1vNsHyZvpZV-rOkPU_0YUCFbtUnO3_wLByuW0aIB5xWLwRMqJ57T-25hpMTGrkPcZ9GbrEWx2mXIMoK4VhAttbCEXhmfJLDgat-AO_68m-Jabu-NT0o_cjyzrVQwJquTQIBfYVeOslD2uZ4iBO-i_SkJLa2biOTHltDoeRl1TM9X_09vn1ZVYnkwmJBLYYNtn-Oyoc93lt_j0Ku9Hko45jOvdHsXHLfIzMn8tep4kU6nFFzApZPZvEvzMD2Am96HnUBeUdM11257KV07LL16hzRQ_zOBcHUEYLd3cvxvDzm_evMcwEGqovzwyEQMlT2ioG7_nxlTxk%3D)
---

**Having been to Afghanistan three times** I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. **We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban**.

While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure.

For America
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

clean_body: As a veteran of the Afghanistan war running for Congress, I'm curious to know what you think of Biden's botched withdrawalToday I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | Fellow Conservative, My heart is heavy this morning as I write this email to you. As a veteran of the Army and the United States intelligence community who deployed to Afghanistan 3 times over the course of nine years, I’m watching in horror as desperate families cling to U.S. military aircraft in hopes of finding safe haven from the Taliban. I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withdrawal, I mean it. President Biden clearly misled the American public in July when he said that “ There’s going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the United States embassy.” But what angers me more is that I know men like me, who serve in our special forces, will bear the brunt of Biden’s decision to pull out of Afghanistan in such a reckless manner. How do I know? Because I spent six years tracking down the Islamic terrorists who killed our Ambassador in Benghazi, Libya on September 11th, 2012 while Hillary Clinton slept. This is not a withdrawal; this is an abandonment leading to a humanitarian crisis of the likes we have not seen this century. My heart is breaking for my brothers that I lost on the battlefield, and for the members of the special forces who are going to be responsible for cleaning up this mess in the near future. This crisis perfectly sums up why I’m running for Congress, and today | I don’t have to run for Congress, I’ve got a great job and a newborn son at home. But this absolute shit storm that Biden created should keep us all up at night.I’ve interrogated Taliban terrorists at Bagram Airfield, I can tell you on good authority that Biden was well aware that something like this could happen. An article in the Wall Street Journal summed up the situation rather succinctly saying, “ The jihadists the U.S. toppled 20 years ago for sheltering Osama bin Laden will not fly their flag over the U.S. Embassy building on the 20th anniversary of 9/11.” The Taliban’s advances come as no surprise to us veterans of the Afghanistan conflict, I personally have deployed to Afghanistan 3 times during both my time in the Army and within the Intelligence Community. We all knew that the Afghan National Army and Uniformed Police was an ineffective fighting force propped by U.S. logistics, U.S. air support and U.S. funding. Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "leader " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. Mr. President, the blood is on your hands. Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel. Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that “ The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions.” Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we’re seeing unfold today. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have. . Having been to Afghanistan three times I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban. While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure. For America John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia Don't want to receive our emails?

clean_body: | Folks, With the Delta variant of coronavirus spreading rapidly throughout Texas, we are at a critical inflection point in the fight against COVID. All across Texas, cases are increasing rapidly and hospitalizations are nearing full-capacity as ICU beds fill up. Gov. Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick have completely neglected their responsibility to lead Texas out of the pandemic and into recovery. It is an absolute disgrace that all the progress we’ve made in the past year to vaccinate Texans will be gone due to their inaction. But with vaccination rates already lagging behind the rest of the nation, we are running out of time to protect our neighbors and loved ones. Now more than ever, we need new leadership who will stand up for our most vulnerable communities and act with courage. Dan Patrick’s silence is not governance — it’s deadly. Pitch in any amount to help us send Dan Patrick packing for his reckless failures. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you are doing to protect your neighbors. It’s critical that we come together to support all Texans in the fight to overcome this public health crisis once and for all. — Mike The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

To stop Donald Trump’s handpicked guy from winning, we need to turn out voters in every corner of the Commonwealth — that’s expensive and it’s why I’m humbly asking for your help. = Thanks for stepping up, Terry = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

Fellow American,

_There's a tidal wave building right now_ - a huge "red wave" of Republican wins coming in 2022.

This is a historic opportunity for widespread victories like the ones the GOP scored in 1994 _and gave our party control of both the Senate and the House of Representatives for the first time in over 40 years._

Fellow American, when you look at President Joe Biden's first six months in office and Democrats running the House and the Senate, things have been _amazingly bad._

The Democrats have already spent trillions of your tax dollars on massive giveaways to their supporters, driving up inflation and prices for America's working families. Incredibly, they plan to spend trillions more.

In the wake of last summer's rampant leftist political violence and demonization of police, crime is exploding in our big cities, while the Democrats hold committee hearings to look for conservative conspiracies where none exist.

Our wide-open Mexican border is seeing the highest level of illegal immigration in ten years with Customs and Border Patrol officers apprehending more than 180,000 migrants crossing the border in May alone. From Afghanistan to the South China Sea, the threat of wider conflict seems greater every day.

Fellow American, the American people understand that Democrat rule in Washington has come at a high price to our prosperity, freedom, and security, and they're ready for a new direction. The GOP has a huge opportunity - _**[but ONLY IF we have the resources we need to help them win.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d7fe9e29df3341aabbb2811369cc443a&_e=jS1aqjQuFfmSVKqB6_xVrcAzBmg5EZniJygV4GW-rcNnwvMIBCsKVlcIA0o_bcO0gh_aqvVtQkt7NGnKdDf9lidBvBZkkvErewvk5zwST0lR3W42Nwa2vuR11l9lRghOQ0GFvxbmCnuL8nC5h-_w0i_v1-vttstWYt0yqJQUnfsGgyTTUJeLs_JZoQuzkqejlSRQlpdzr5K4JzR2pfT-9eFuFq9cE_FI4KkZTHjKjgHEPq_hYzc7cCFz2Z1L5OBmXhm0XQH7vmWXIbvNGYEDbFRkmg27S7x9Hp1GjdI9pW2jqA42pofETroLD4YQ0bnAYPOCemmCDEQEggqgFysGcYyWYmgOrRe9Qb55oiDuW3Wl7JWWGdgMrYMuNq5aQ7IeGUmkMr_u41h0GRdae5oCQdyHwIxxEdUzSu7fCsZ_VsSHk1ASaq2YbX0NIK89Z_l_mueYDu6Ox0B3MTnKSPUsSZfNtfTJa8leeXkhuqhsQCc%3D)**_

name: Giffords.org
subject: First...Then...Now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

**FIRST:** We told you about the rise of the “New NRA:” The National Shooting Sports Foundation, or NSSF.
**THEN:** We told you the NSSF is outspending the NRA to oppose our priorities, and if left unchecked, they’d be a big detriment to our mission.
**NOW:** It’s clear the NSSF isn’t just rising up to become the new NRA, they are the new NRA and we have to be ready to go up against them.
**So we’re setting a goal of raising $10,000 today to fight back and we need your help. So what do you say, friend?**
[**If you are able, will you chip in $3 today to help us go head-to-head with the NSSF? This is a setback, but we are still so close to enacting change — real change — for our communities and we can’t afford to lose that opportunity now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210817-1-15&t=1&refcode2=707_3935704_K6Cbz8&akid=707%2E3935704%2EK6Cbz8)

body:
We need more working people in the Senate
#

Friend,
I know what it’s like to have your heat turned off in the winter, face a mountain of student loan debt, and struggle for stable housing.
I even grew up watching my mom ration her insulin — so I know what so many families are feeling right now because I’ve lived it first-hand how Washington has failed folks like us.
**And if we’re going to fix what’s broken, then we need more working people like us in the U.S. Senate.**
But here’s the thing — if we’re going to do the kind of organizing and voter outreach necessary to build a winning movement across Pennsylvania ahead of our primary election, it’s absolutely essential that we meet our fundraising goals along the way.
[This campaign is funded by lots of people giving small donations. Could you make a donation to fund a part of our movement today? We’re powered 100% by grassroots supporters like you, so any amount you donate gives us the resources we need to stay in this fight for the long haul.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34217939/301279415/-353695395?refcode2=ed14e466-95ff-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210817-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0ZTQ2Ni05NWZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0RqZZGpLzMtN5Z-117SZLMh7ygz88gCrZwUdjhd5GG8=)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Furious . . .
body:
Like you, I've been bombarded with images coming out of Afghanistan.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q) Like you, I've been bombarded with images coming out of Afghanistan.

It's infuriating.

The lives lost, American families broken, the toll we've taken over the past 20 years has been devastating . . . and all progress was lost over the weekend as Joe Biden was vacationing.

And I know **it will only get worse**.

Congress, most notably Nancy Pelosi provides lip service to "protect the women and children in Afghanistan", while ignoring that the country is once again the training ground of terrorists.

And what's the Department of Homeland Security doing?

They recently released a terrorism alert identifying "opposition to COVID measures" and "claims of election fraud" as the biggest potential terror threats as we near the 20th anniversary of 9/11.
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q) [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)
Our borders are nearly WIDE OPEN and a known conduit for terrorists to enter our homeland.

But don't take my word for it.

On August 14th, the outgoing head of Border Patrol, Rodney Scott, sounded the alarm on our crisis:
"I firmly believe that it is a national security crisis. Immigration is just a subcomponent of it, and right now, it's just a cover for massive amounts of smuggling going across the southwest border - **to include TSDB 's (suspected terrorists) at a level we have never seen before. That's the real threat.**" [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)
The Biden Administration and Congress want to keep their narrative on "Domestic Terrorism" because it's a political play to keep conservatives silent and in disarray out of fear of the FBI knocking on our doors.

While they're trying to convince you that your Pro-Trump friends and family are terrorists, they're IGNORING the VERY real threats that are literally marching across our borders and into our neighborhoods.

[**Help me get to Congress today so we can focus on keeping our nation secure.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)

[**Any amount you can donate will help me get one step closer to taking on the radical leftists and Jihadists that are occupying the Capitol.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)

Thank you for taking a moment to read this message, and thank you so much for your support.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. We're weeks away from the 20th Anniversary of the September 11th attacks that led to our involvement in Afghanistan. That day changed our nation forever, and Biden and Democrats in Congress are willing to allow an Islamic flag to fly over our embassy in Kabul on the 20th anniversary.
[**Help me get to Congress so we never forget, and never stop protecting our nation.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NOtikcEsMFtL68CwDcc91Q/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/wV7638aVqFDnTeb5gFdCkC4Q)

name: Team Engel
subject: Early support is key

name: Team Kilmer Finance Team
subject: Back on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

August is traditionally a slower month for digital fundraising, but we've fallen behind where we need to be.

We're not going to tell you the sky is falling or anything -- because it isn't. But it's really important that we close this fundraising gap. While Derek is busy fighting for all of us, it's our job to raise the resources to run a successful re-election campaign to ensure he can continue working every day for us in the other Washington.

**That 's why we're asking for your help today.**

This grassroots team has stepped up before, and we're counting on you to do it again. We know we can raise the resources needed -- but not without you, Peter.

**[Help us get our digital fundraising back on track. Will you rush a donation of $5, $10 -- whatever you're able -- before Wednesday's mid-month deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/eANFAALcxlWC2lufIzbwoA34FeKCPoWM_n0mklCwNls=/KMh9PMgb6ldKoSeUrgAPIrARbuBNMHt0ABx4gpZ0rOY=?gpsid=50_115_20171&refcode=em21_210817_mm1_fnd_gq_act__TKFT_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210817_mm1_fnd_gq_act__TKFT_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer Finance Team

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/eANFAALcxlWC2lufIzbwoA34FeKCPoWM_n0mklCwNls=/KMh9PMgb6ldKoSeUrgAPIrARbuBNMHt0ABx4gpZ0rOY=?gpsid=50_115_20171&refcode=em21_210817_mm1_fnd_gq_act__TKFT_ettx_v2_box&utm_campaign=em21_210817_mm1_fnd_gq_act__TKFT_ettx_v2_box&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: It only takes $1
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

$3
That is the contribution we are asking you to make to Mark Kelly’s campaign for Senate. If you’re ready to chip in to keep Mark in the Senate, just use this link:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/August-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210817-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1155_6688874_LU_u0S&akid=1155%2E6688874%2ELU_u0S)
Otherwise, let us explain why this request is so important.
As you know, we are facing a deep bench of challengers who want to take back this seat. And they are gaining ground, because just last week CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
And to make things even more challenging, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
Now you can bet Trump and McConnell will stop at nothing to do what they have to do to take back this seat. But we’re ready. We’re working around the clock to hit our fundraising goal this month to help hold this seat.
**Anything you can afford to give will make a huge difference, which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to defend Mark and hold this seat in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210817-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1155_6688874_LU_u0S&akid=1155%2E6688874%2ELU_u0S)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

It only takes $1 to get involved in a people-powered campaign like ours, and when you do, you immediately become part of a team of individuals all coming together for a common purpose: _to keep Mark Kelly in the Senate where he can continue to fight for us and our families._
So thank you in advance for chipping in,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1155%2E6688874%2ELU_u0S).

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: pesky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
As a working mom, former small business owner, daughter of two public school teachers, and Wisconsin’s State Treasurer, I couldn’t be more different than Ron Johnson. Unlike him, I'll actually do right by working families in the U.S. Senate.

[**Peter, if you’re ready to cut to the chase, please make a donation to my campaign to help us defeat Ron Johnson. Anything you can give will be put to immediate use to defend our campaign from his attacks and get our message out to voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34219798/301287673/-1170382953?gpsid=31_130_20111&refcode=em21_210817_MM5_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210817_MM5_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDBjNmVlMC05OWZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQXS9-hH8BpP9Uh9LmlMoKVwtTuu9OKOJZxyIvffKvw=)

Now, let’s compare records:

I believe in science. Ron Johnson believes in conspiracies. I believe climate change is hurting our people and our planet. He thinks it’s “bullsh*t.” I believe vaccines save lives. He spreads dangerous lies about them. And I believe we need to end the filibuster to restore voting rights and protect democracy. I bet you can guess where he stands...

Here’s what else I believe: The wealthy need to pay their fair share. But Ron Johnson seems to believe they are paying _too much_ , which is why he personally pushed a massive tax break for himself and his rich campaign donors. It’s the definition of corruption, and it’s why I refuse to take a single dime of corporate PAC money.

That means I need to send you these pesky fundraising emails every now and then to ask you to chip in a few dollars. Trust me, I don’t enjoy doing it. I know how hard you work for every dollar. But your donations -- no matter how large or small -- are a critical part of how we’re going to build a winning campaign.

[**Peter, before our fundraising deadline expires at midnight, can you please rush a donation of $5 to ensure this grassroots campaign has the resources to defeat Ron Johnson and send a scrappy fighter for Wisconsin families to the U.S. Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34219799/301287674/-1170382953?gpsid=31_130_20111&refcode=em21_210817_MM5_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210817_MM5_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDBjNmVlMC05OWZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQXS9-hH8BpP9Uh9LmlMoKVwtTuu9OKOJZxyIvffKvw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34219800/301287675/-1170382953?gpsid=31_130_20111&refcode=em21_210817_MM5_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210817_MM5_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDBjNmVlMC05OWZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQXS9-hH8BpP9Uh9LmlMoKVwtTuu9OKOJZxyIvffKvw=)

clean_body: As a working mom, former small business owner, daughter of two public school teachers, and Wisconsin’s State Treasurer, I couldn’t be more different than Ron Johnson. Unlike him, I'll actually do right by working families in the U.S. Senate. = Now, let’s compare records: I believe in science. Ron Johnson believes in conspiracies. I believe climate change is hurting our people and our planet. He thinks it’s “bullsht.” I believe vaccines save lives. He spreads dangerous lies about them. And I believe we need to end the filibuster to restore voting rights and protect democracy. I bet you can guess where he stands... Here’s what else I believe: The wealthy need to pay their fair share. But Ron Johnson seems to believe they are paying too much , which is why he personally pushed a massive tax break for himself and his rich campaign donors. It’s the definition of corruption, and it’s why I refuse to take a single dime of corporate PAC money. That means I need to send you these pesky fundraising emails every now and then to ask you to chip in a few dollars. Trust me, I don’t enjoy doing it. I know how hard you work for every dollar. But your donations -- no matter how large or small -- are a critical part of how we’re going to build a winning campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I'm relying on everyday people to help fund this campaign. subject: Big endorsements incoming!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
We all want election integrity. |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=788d1b7d6b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative in Arizona, and the voice of the Election Integrity movement. I am running for Arizona Secretary of State.

**I paid for the initial election integrity hearings out of pocket when nobody else would listen. I spoke up when everyone else stood silent about the 2020 election.**

_And now, the movement has spread across the country far and wide. We are seeing election audits pop up all around the country, a Newsom recall effort growing stronger every day, and Cuomo resigning._

**_In short, we are seeing the beginning of the new red wave that will wash away the lies and hatred of the Democrats, and we see a brighter future ahead._**

This is why I need your help. This is, at its core, a grassroots movement. And without your help, Big Corporations win, Big Tech wins, the establishment wins, special interest wins, and come November of 2022, the Democrats win.

**But we can stop this – together.**

_[Donate today with a generous contribution to make sure that the Red wave defeats the Radical Left in 2022 and that we never have to worry about our elections being stolen again!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=16559228ad&e=44b8c466b0)_

I am writing you today with a big update.

**We are gathering support for our Secretary of State campaign at breakneck speed.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5539184664&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Senator Borrelli, one of the key Arizona senators leading the fight on election integrity just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State.

**He is an excellent Senator and a great man, and I am so happy to stand by him in the fight against election fraud.**

Senator Borelli said about me:

_“I endorse Mark Finchem for Secretary of State. He is a staunch defender of our elections and is actively working to secure them for future generations. He is a tough fighter who will take on the Democrats and win. He won’t back down to the power brokers who don’t want our elections to be free or fair. Please join me in supporting Mark Finchem in any way you can.”_

I am honored to have such an endorsement.

**But that’s not all.**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3807a73601&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Arizona State Rep. Leo Biasiucci just endorsed my campaign.

**He said:**

_“Mark Finchem demanded free & fair elections from day one. He took a stand for accountability & accuracy when few others would. He loves our state. He love sour country. And he wants to make sure your vote counts. Join me in supporting Mark Finchem for Arizona Secretary of State!”_

**I could not be more proud to have two great statesmen and great men endorse my campaign for Secretary of State.**

_In this race, it is not just me versus the Democrats, it is America versus the Democrats._

**It is you and me working together with elected officials like State Rep Biasiucci and Senator Borrelli to fight against election fraud and defend our great Constitution.**
---
| Will you join in the fight?

[_Join me, Representative Biasiucci, and Senator Borrelli today with a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more so that we can win the critical Secretary of State race for America first Conservatives!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a75365ecf8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4e6448c4f3&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1056ba48b4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=23c3fe1920) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=23c3fe1920).

name: Erica Smith
subject: I stood at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re more than halfway through.
#
Hi, it's Erica.
Good news: **We’re more than halfway through our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_!** I CAN’T believe we’ve come this far since we launched the tour back in June.
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, can you make a donation of $10, $5, or even $3 to help fund the rest of the 100 Counties, 100 Days Tour? Your contribution allows us to continue our tour because it helps pay for things like PPE, gas in the campaign van, and venue space as we continue meeting thousands of North Carolian voters across the state._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210817-354&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=354%2E3698%2EdN578-)
**[Contribute »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210817-354&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=354%2E3698%2EdN578-)**
Thanks to the online grassroots support we’ve received so far, we recently completed another major leg of our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_.
We made some great stops this weekend in Orange, Rowan, and Cumberland Counties. Thank you all so much for the warm welcomes! I was glad to spend time outdoors.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210817-354&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=354%2E3698%2EdN578-)
In Alleghany County, I stood right at the Virginia-North Carolina state border. Last November, Virginia voters won legal marijuana for their state. Shouldn’t we do the same in North Carolina?
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210817-354&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=354%2E3698%2EdN578-)
We also stopped to speak with voters at the Duplin Winery in Duplin County. I'm grateful to everyone who pulled up.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210817-354&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=354%2E3698%2EdN578-)
Rural communities like the ones I'm visiting need a voice in North Carolina. Issues like polluting CAFOs, rural broadband, and the closure of rural hospitals call for immediate action. As a United States Senator, I will take immediate action.
**Heck, elect me to the U.S. Senate, and I could even be the deciding vote on urgent policies like the Green New Deal, universal broadband, and Medicare for All!**
But I can’t get there — or finish our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_ — without your grassroots support.
[**_If it makes sense for your budget, can you make a donation of $5 or more to our campaign for U.S. Senate today? Ours is one of the most competitive Senate races of 2022, so let’s deliver a win for our Democratic majority and for our progressive movement._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210817-354&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=354%2E3698%2EdN578-)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica ❤️

clean_body: We’re more than halfway through. Hi, it's Erica. Good news: We’re more than halfway through our 100 Counties, 100 Days Tour! I CAN’T believe we’ve come this far since we launched the tour back in June. - - Thanks to the online grassroots support we’ve received so far, we recently completed another major leg of our 100 Counties, 100 Days Tour. We made some great stops this weekend in Orange, Rowan, and Cumberland Counties. Thank you all so much for the warm welcomes! I was glad to spend time outdoors. - In Alleghany County, I stood right at the Virginia-North Carolina state border. Last November, Virginia voters won legal marijuana for their state. Shouldn’t we do the same in North Carolina? - We also stopped to speak with voters at the Duplin Winery in Duplin County. I'm grateful to everyone who pulled up. - Rural communities like the ones I'm visiting need a voice in North Carolina. Issues like polluting CAFOs, rural broadband, and the closure of rural hospitals call for immediate action. As a United States Senator, I will take immediate action. Heck, elect me to the U.S. Senate, and I could even be the deciding vote on urgent policies like the Green New Deal, universal broadband, and Medicare for All! But I can’t get there — or finish our 100 Counties, 100 Days Tour — without your grassroots support. - - Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Erica ❤️ Erica Smith for U.S. Senate - Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Please Join Me at MACo This Thursday!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
I am delighted to invite you to an Afternoon Reception during the Maryland Association of Counties Summer Conference this Thursday, where I’ll be speaking with close supporters and friends about my vision for the future of our state.
Our reception will be held from 1:00 PM to 3:00 PM. The venue, Liquid Assets, is located at 9301 Coastal Highway, Ocean City, MD 21842.
I’m incredibly excited to attend MACo this year for their first in-person conference since 2019, and I hope you will be able to join me for what is sure to be an action-packed event. With your help, we’re going to bring our vision of competent government to the Governor’s Mansion in 2022, and deliver the bold and practical solutions that Maryland needs for this historic moment.
You can RSVP to my event at this link, and additional details can be found on the invitation below. For our Young Democrats, we’re offering a special ticket price of just $50! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Qi_UDQSn8E6Yo6pB5C9UXQ2]
Warm regards,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png] https://secure.ngpvan.com/Qi_UDQSn8E6Yo6pB5C9UXQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Qi_UDQSn8E6Yo6pB5C9UXQ2]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em081721]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

clean_body: Kamala wants YOU to pay for amnesty... | Peter, Just a few months ago our campaign’s National Chair -- Kimberly Guilfoyle -- called out Kamala for trying to blame her border crisis on “climate change.” Kimberly’s warning about just how dangerous Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority would become is now a terrifying reality... Using the reconciliation process, Kamala’s Senate just instructed the Judiciary Committee to spend $107 BILLION to push AMNESTY. With only 1 SEAT needed to end Kamala’s majority, we can’t let the Democrats steal this OPEN seat -- or else YOU, the taxpayer, will be footing the bill for Kamala’s amnesty plans. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Kimberly Guilfoyle Sent: Mon, May 10, 2021 Subject: You won’t believe what Kamala said - To: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Peter, This is outrageous. Kamala Harris is now blaming her border crisis on... " climate change." I'll tell you the truth about what's causing the border crisis: 🚨Ending construction of President Trump 's wall 🚨Incentivizing illegal immigrants to cross our border 🚨Refusing to deport criminals guilty of assault, theft, and drunk driving We need Republicans to fight back and secure the border, which is why I became the National Chair of pro-Trump Navy SEAL Eric Greitens ' Senate campaign. How can Kamala look the American people in the eye and lie to us by saying that the border crisis is being caused by climate change?** Joe Biden appointed Kamala to fix the border crisis, but she refuses to take even an ounce of responsibility. Worse yet, there are too many RINOs in Washington who lack the spine to stand up to Biden and Kamala and do what it takes to secure the border. Conservative, pro-Trump fighters like Navy SEAL Eric Greitens are our only hope of restoring security to the southern border. name: Team Kaptur
subject: Code red for humanity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
The U.N. Climate Report cannot be ignored. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux7Ed-m2PaYvrQvngOG_yEVi7Cj5YqmFz-6yN4uzNpAmddWg3r4wWq_V4GBYhBLtKWDCkrhtxdMAMXgWXLZYsvL0GqQQLYSt8czO7HRBuvjfxKv3ADbR1Ki_l6jbslxbmeAhFmIuqzExxR8yecOlJt604PMH5Ic59crRRb-NHg36W9xspPhMxkpogWL4kDNq0Ykk8Ekqr3InPh6EEIYd0h1A9v3E6qBgoxkj5If_6tfeAXjnSbzt3Gk_3_juzhURW90MmqYyUrEVuIkKTG3Nj_mftVhlqbMs3GGuXnFsXEgYNX0z97aWcJHO4uByUwVF9xg/3ej/2lXkdf4eSvCKNKjz6b432A/h0/9LWy2VjJ-UgUFHQ-9U2dA1-qKyhGQttzDui5TZihbl8)

| | Friend,

The U.N. Climate Report _cannot be ignored_. The warnings are loud and clear -- this is **“code red for humanity.”** The severity of our storms, heatwaves, and wildfires will continue to worsen if we don’t dramatically reduce our carbon emissions _now_.

The climate-related problems we are facing are human-made, and they are already having dramatic impacts on communities across the country. In Ohio, torrential rains and rising waters in the Great Lakes are threatening families and driving people out of their homes.

**It’s critical that we take bold action to combat climate change and protect the lives of thousands of Americans. And we can do this while creating good-paying jobs in wind, solar, and energy-efficient vehicles.** As Chair of the Energy and Water Subcommittee on Appropriations, Marcy achieved a $350 million investment for the Solar Energy Technology Office that will bring jobs and clean energy innovation to Ohio and the marketplace. That is just one example of her work for a better future.

**[Marcy Kaptur is a fierce defender of the environment. Ohio needs Marcy’s leadership in Congress to take climate change head-on and protect our delicate planet. Can you pitch in $20 to keep Marcy in Congress so she can keep fighting for Ohio?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdLFlqmtyf_jtqj-bA0azI-rEO-53itk2OZs8AyL5GcT0enEwxY4lGkVKX2fCqPEOp16nOy0ZqMBlPe2ZRSFINiic_drwpnjW5po0JCLMjurMwPYs_1W8slCKQmEw9Qd9omPNZXbR_Gai0aorJKt6k4uwbQZUspqE6DB7fENWVG8SdJiVc1mSMoWmnAcepouDUSmLictSUltNNjlY9No27hqExKPyrkGV13vuP_q3o0InffkhO0a-UieTHynJ4UkFi9AWF-qdtUOKnDve26-gg1JPTO2hGyvdPlXzHkMywD1ONd3ObvnCdgRmtIjzxiN4su_1pwvOS15vUlolWu0gda5/3ej/2lXkdf4eSvCKNKjz6b432A/h1/T_idRRPwIRoev_4YZytsK7FCX3EztGLIQ3pA1tr9E_0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Donate $10 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKKQ8_q_i-5MU1_3bqsfJJX5X7mUfBEbZ4sGaT0Q0b_ALpYovkg1GtKYTp9HeUCmgee2F7QFG668zdLc95wetezeqI1mPAXv0E0fMysbN_UhVgSU6aFG4_kz9ZrsTsbLUFOTsN6lskC-Y-Zr9Kpaq5GX30TktTrKvgr3R7iXgcabyfdqvY4N_U1fmRf_gF6PTOfEkNS1cpEPFpyJdAAJkBzB2rNO75K3GcHeEF-LKJ4gaSPwIcB_21-p91vQyOp_lx1kRTxsMVlP_UCj7rpbU-2Ho072GXUIPaUmEr92EEUAgFPcYQT0s-as5JX6aj7KKW2Du_EjgQtpmMMyvZNY8J5/3ej/2lXkdf4eSvCKNKjz6b432A/h2/k7gUX9Y_rotl7AlNtZviK2eGkOI_MWos3wU2q9lCWIE)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
I'll be blunt: **Our democracy is facing its greatest threat in generations.**

Republicans are attempting to strip away voting rights in 49 states across the country -- doing everything they can to stop people from voting, not win over the voters.

As a nefarious tool in their quest to suppress the vote, they continue to spread lies about the 2020 election.

And with the help of their mega-donors and a fringe base, they're shattering fundraising records to bully their way back into the Majority.

**It 's a perfect storm right now. There's just no other way to put it. We must fight back.**

I am committed to doing everything I can to defend our Democratic majority.

But I can't win this fight alone. You are critical in the battle for our democracy.

House Democrats have a mission-critical deadline coming up in just 12 hours and your help has never been more important.

**[So please, before time runs out on our 12-hour deadline, will you chip in $3 to meet our goal, defend our House Majority, and defeat Trump's House Republicans?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)

Adam

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: North Carolina cannot afford our Republican opponents and their partisan games in the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
If Democrats lose this race...
#

We need to be clear about the stakes here: **If Democrats lose this race, we will be giving the seat to an extreme Republican more worried about Donald Trump’s commands than the people of North Carolina.**
All three of our Republican opponents said they were opposed to the bipartisan infrastructure bill. They would have voted against bringing $8.7 billion to North Carolina to fund good-paying jobs, public transportation, electric vehicles, broadband internet, roads and bridges.
Yet again, our opponents are putting partisanship above the needs of our state.
**[We cannot afford their backward thinking in the Senate. body:
John Fetterman is the *only* candidate on the Democratic side who can reliably + soundly defeat every Republican in the race in a general election matchup.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210817-2308-header&t=1&akid=2308%2E434096%2ELYX03R)
Peter,
These past few weeks have confirmed what we've known since day one:
**The race to flip Pennsylvania's open Senate seat will be the most competitive in the entire country in 2022.**
Latest poll numbers indicate that John Fetterman is the *only* candidate on the Democratic side who can reliably + soundly defeat every Republican in the race in a general election matchup. And with a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, this race is an absolute must-win for Democrats in 2022.
**We haven't seen your name on our list of people who've signed on to make their official personal endorsement in this race yet, so we're coming to you to ask: ****[Will you personally endorse John Fetterman in this race to flip this Pennsylvania Senate seat blue?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-endorse-email-2021/?source=em20210817&t=2&akid=2308%2E434096%2ELYX03R)**
**_Peter's Official Endorsement Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Endorsement status:** No — not yet! **[Endorse John →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-endorse-email-2021/?source=em20210817&t=3&akid=2308%2E434096%2ELYX03R)**
---
Giving John your personal endorsement only takes a few seconds — but it's an important and powerful way to get on the record as one of his official supporters in this ultra-competitive race.
John + our entire team at Fetterman HQ know that winning this seat for working people will require grassroots support from all across the country, so please represent your state by giving John your official endorsement right now: ⤵️
**Our records show that you haven't yet signed on as an official endorser of John Fetterman for U.S. Senate.** [**Will you add your name now if you're with John in this race to flip this seat blue in 2022?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-endorse-email-2021/?source=em20210817&t=4&akid=2308%2E434096%2ELYX03R)
**[Endorse John →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-endorse-email-2021/?source=em20210817&t=5&akid=2308%2E434096%2ELYX03R)**
Thank you for your dedicated support, 💪
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210817-2308-footer&t=6&refcode2=2308_434096_LYX03R&akid=2308%2E434096%2ELYX03R)**

name: John Castorani
subject: Biden's Benghazi Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
They both sleep soundly during terrorist attacks. It's time to hold Democrats accountable for their failures. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)
---

Peter,

My heart is heavy this morning as I write this email to you. As a veteran of the Army and the United States intelligence community **who deployed to Afghanistan 3 times** over the course of nine years, I'm watching in horror as desperate families cling to U.S. military aircraft in hopes of finding safe haven from the Taliban.

**I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withdrawal, I mean it**. President Biden clearly misled the American public in July when he said that "_**There 's going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the United States embassy**_."

But what angers me more is that I know men like me, who serve in our special forces, will bear the brunt of Biden's decision to pull out of Afghanistan in such a reckless manner. How do I know? **Because I spent six years tracking down the Islamic terrorists who killed our Ambassador in Benghazi, Libya on September 11th, 2012 while Hillary Clinton slept.**

**This is not a withdrawal; this is an abandonment leading to a humanitarian crisis of the likes we have not seen this century**. My heart is breaking for my brothers that I lost on the battlefield, **and for the members of the special forces who are going to be responsible for cleaning up this mess in the near future**.

This crisis perfectly sums up why I'm running for Congress, and today **[I'm asking you to lend your support to my campaign](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)**. I don't have to run for Congress, I've got a great job and a newborn son at home. But this absolute shit storm that Biden created should keep us all up at night.**I 've interrogated Taliban terrorists at Bagram Airfield in Kabul, I can tell you on good authority that Biden was well aware that something like this could happen**.

| [**STOP BIDEN
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)
An article in the Wall Street Journal summed up the situation rather succinctly saying, "_**The jihadists the U.S. toppled 20 years ago for sheltering Osama bin Laden will not fly their flag over the U.S. Embassy building on the 20th anniversary of 9/11**_."

**The Taliban 's advances come as no surprise to us veterans of the Afghanistan conflict, I personally have deployed to Afghanistan 3 times during both my time in the Army and within the Intelligence Community**. We all knew that the Afghan National Army and Uniformed Police was an ineffective fighting force propped by U.S. logistics, U.S. air support and U.S. funding. Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "**leader** " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. **Mr. President, the blood is on your hands**.

Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. **This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel**.

**Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need**. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that "_The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions_."

[**STOP BIDEN
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)
---

Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we're seeing unfold today. **President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have**.

**[Today I'm asking you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress, because I assure you that if I'm given the opportunity to serve, I'll make sure Biden and Pelosi are held to account for these foolish decisions](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)**.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58148713:66_BPUlBN:m:1:3253819041:90F10253D0E89C712443A01569981027:r)
---

**Having been to Afghanistan three times** I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. **We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban**.

While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure.

For America
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
---

On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz.

Despite the tragic outcome, Republicans keep doubling down on Trump’s anti-democratic lies.

_That’s what makes the January 6 Commission so important. We have to understand why the insurrection happened so we can stop one from ever happening again._

**[With Virginia Republicans like Glenn Youngkin doubling down on Trump’s lies with so-called “election integrity rallies,” we want to know -- do you support the work of the January 6 Commission?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpULdpOO_g4PgFtD4ctJCj-Pow8yqgic3gJ5wKnZoiAPSAL9v_YuGk27ixDXVKwVgrA9ure7k_SqKxrOhXGuAgTvynFXD36o6y6trTFnK1ViMT6VDYFzBEpUApnfYUMB2MiFTdqOn_cDi9VrgSCjahtcodAnAaWtzr8vMOUYsosvhcDjgD46Mqi2yifXHWyBKprUiPTaOkeQsJSY9MDoOUxc/3ej/CLmHRE3wQ6eGLktisHf8MQ/h1/DMbS6sGH7pFeaZfBqK29yBUmwcAVpwAAA6LWg7-ED00)** **[ YES ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpZSrh7Wue9cHfj256VeTgwTWdIL_XUTNshbCadNZZpdddPjloC8QrDF-3xZAwVnHPjSlNOG-yDUulzm_FhCbwS84GVp33EPSQtTuKM89T7aN9N_BZ8lsDfz1vylWpApjN8dN7PHhsVzAvOwUOWhKSNstirW8j8PgzYE3tUDLTibLlz8UqmCJlwID7i1d_AViUfY2bXKXGBfeks0zc23CnxM/3ej/CLmHRE3wQ6eGLktisHf8MQ/h2/hpWnY5kUZ89bRarIAON8hhxW3AZ56ZHOEapvfyQcr_M)
[ NO ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpTzMFreVc0h-P4Sf0aqwGXWQNRIuc7VYfk55ZNAqDIGZz2gvfBzLIZ9t4sDOCMwbkUBVpu1caTz2ax3m3TOQFhFyK0h7nfbJ7GGdRMld6VO5BZDfNBaoXxG1Ambo4toSS1isVg8s8Ksdr_iqjQOpiw5533oy0BCiqEJxhoeZb_u2Lh6D2AQ3NSUb5ACJ2cbT4BLy6gupPK9ygHcQpvLJPKg/3ej/CLmHRE3wQ6eGLktisHf8MQ/h3/FPlw227PW-aQZpQpYr0oDf6F9dmIkn3T0GiP7ExvBII) ** Republicans across the country continue to sabotage our elections. In state after state, they are introducing racist voter suppression bills to stop people from voting. Now, Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin wants to bring those same anti-democratic laws to Virginia.

We can’t let guys like Glenn Youngkin get away with taking away our freedom to vote. The January 6 Commission is a huge opportunity to hold them accountable.

name: Josh Harder
subject: Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/WTgbakfDec1S71jdLK9-HDQtLHoBG6rSEbUfshBaeaQ=/NTNGmA9URP-pZ0YOiKqNi9YCffnJS9PNjkm3qosVNSg=?refcode=E10754-20210814-QAnon-header-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Hi All - The news coming out of Afghanistan is devastating. My team is currently working around the clock to connect multiple Valley families stranded in Afghanistan with the State Department. I wanted to make sure I shared important resources on ways to help. If you or someone you know is in Afghanistan and needs help, [this website](https://act.myngp.com/el/WTgbakfDec1S71jdLK9-HDQtLHoBG6rSEbUfshBaeaQ=/5QyNuMZ2keaEyCIcfnBf4_TKV4kJFLAPvnxUbFGFbUA=?fbclid=IwAR0N6ZdO-AdPIE1Z7PB_Qgh_rhg4SqlgxCNXTjS76oAGMXYEXq0SrKGqRY8) has the most up to date information from the State Department. To contact the State Department directly, call their hotline at 1-888-407-4747 (domestic calls) and 1-202-501-4444 (overseas calls). If you are in the U.S. and looking to help, you can sign up [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/WTgbakfDec1S71jdLK9-HDQtLHoBG6rSEbUfshBaeaQ=/gbAJKSxWoFppMABhTewSABahDVvNXva1FXhhjdCjM-w=) to assist with airport pick-ups, apartment set-ups or bringing a meal to refugees when they arrive. Finally, if you'd like to donate to help Afghans in crisis, I recommend giving to the International Rescue Committee which I'm linking [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/WTgbakfDec1S71jdLK9-HDQtLHoBG6rSEbUfshBaeaQ=/e2xoAPtNC9Q8BMiJw3fMUfcjBEI8fz9gJgji-Kh1ro0=). It's an incredibly challenging time, but we're working hard to help as many as we can. Please keep everyone who's in danger in Afghanistan in your prayers. Josh
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WTgbakfDec1S71jdLK9-HDQtLHoBG6rSEbUfshBaeaQ=/3Inu2m0oEOPfFh6RoXEFwSfOjt-Y4gfPykrvFtp5HMY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/WTgbakfDec1S71jdLK9-HDQtLHoBG6rSEbUfshBaeaQ=/wC4gei6FQpmUi6i8OVDHgGTovS_IbXEggXl5SSwTPFM=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WTgbakfDec1S71jdLK9-HDQtLHoBG6rSEbUfshBaeaQ=/rEKRYfzkAHiKfaxONTayXsm4q_WifIRYZhFQGbjVnDQ=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/WTgbakfDec1S71jdLK9-HDQtLHoBG6rSEbUfshBaeaQ=/M5YSszXHBhG7KkFyW3JDncW9p76iPyCpCH8UCiE4ZBE=) here.

Harder for Congress

Modesto CA 95352 United States

name: Impeach Joe Biden (via Laurel Imer)
subject: Sign the Official Impeach Biden Petition now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
Sign your name onto the Official Impeach Joe Biden petition below.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ViMpBp4W2HtP76eTxQx8ZEpT8FPWGaT1QZEXwYyCqEEudcA_Nztmrpio7j8m7orfZNIEWlx_G18N2Y6e4QhOQSiiIGjhEOJ2ShJlTJwOp2v5l0H37jvU-jNRucoruZ9ho24qiU_E6PyYxlHV-fhRUUXkTZpFzZGu51AQkZNXVmHePnBqfiqPMBXEjMKCKAlH25q-79iInEY=&c=pv66e989DRohunl5jVLWchr-akuxqD5wcNPmMKimUzGUooG9KhmEFA==&ch=Y5SCb2BNMdbJDFeL9-VP3wTzwebCyBq6cT7ocdhLvw1kOWo-y0xRcQ==)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| August 17th
---
| | |
---
| A Message from Laurel Imer on Afghanistan.
---
| |
---
| Patriot,
The utter and complete failure of the United States "war" in Afghanistan is simply a snapshot into the realization of the failure of globalism to the citizens of the United States and the world.
I, in full transparency, supported the Bush decision to go to war following the attacks of 9-11, when I believed the intent was to win. It is now clear, that the Bureaucrats in Washington DC effectively tied the laces of our boots on the ground and caused irreparable damage to countless American families.
I have since learned and pay better attention to the outcome of the consequences of the actions our government takes when they try to be the keeper of the world.
Following WWII, the choice of war has never been about winning, rather, about the need to participate in some type of Preschool Globalist Group Time- playing a circle jerk of political correctness. The rules of engagement we put on our troops are disgraceful at best. We send our men and women into harm's way - without the tools to win the fight and then cry about the consequences of war.
Somewhere along the way, we failed to understand the meaning of the word. Are we there for an Absolute war - Instrumental war - or Agonistic fighting? This is the problem - no one ever asked what type of engagement we were beginning.
I do not agree with war - however, if we are going there, then go to win - Period. There is no other alternative in my interpretation. This is the failure we are seeing firsthand today in Afghanistan.
The failure to understand the purpose of the fight, with no end in sight. We instead put American soldier's lives on the line- for the longest war in American history - for what? NOTHING!!! Nothing but a global game of tag.
Now - we leave millions of dollars of American-made equipment - tanks, weapons, drones - in the hands of the enemy. The enemy, who has declared JIHAD on citizens around the world, including Americans for decades.
How utterly ridiculous and a complete insult to the families of those who lost everything. I am grieving today with over 2,000 GOLD STAR families, the mothers, fathers, brothers, sisters, and more whose loved ones gave the last measure of devotion for a fight we never intended to actually win.
What about the physical sacrifices of over 20,000 of our wounded brothers and sisters since 2001?
History repeats itself for those who fail to learn the lessons provided. I supported troop withdrawal in the region for many reasons - but it had to be done in an intelligent manner with proper planning and knowledge of the possible repercussion of those actions, i.e., the effect our leaving would have on the Afghan people, and our citizens in Afghanistan as well.
But - no, the Biden administration gave no regard for anyone's security or safety, our Americans stationed there, or the safety of any others in the region. So now here we are, 20 years later for what?
Once again never considering the outcome, what happens now? Terrorism of the rise? Oil and gas prices? The safety of the Middle East, Israel, the United States, The World?
Tell me today, how are those globalists, save the world policies working out?
As Americans, we should demand that our leaders only and always do what is best for the lives of American citizens. Fight if we must - to defend the United States and our Allies - to the death and complete destruction - if that is what is necessary. If we cannot commit to winning the war then do not go to war!
Remember WWII. Had we not made the ultimate decision to fight - and to win - where would we be today? We must learn from our mistakes and not let history repeat itself for future generations. Always putting America First instead of others is the decision I stand behind today and always.
I, Laurel Imer, am calling for the Impeachment of the Biden Administration for their blatant Dereliction of Duty in the midst of the Afghanistan Crisis, and I hope you will join me in the fight to Save America and Put America First once again.
---

clean_body: Sign your name onto the Official Impeach Joe Biden petition below. | | | | | | | == | | | | | August 17th | | | | A Message from Laurel Imer on Afghanistan. | | | Patriot, The utter and complete failure of the United States "war" in Afghanistan is simply a snapshot into the realization of the failure of globalism to the citizens of the United States and the world. I, in full transparency, supported the Bush decision to go to war following the attacks of 9-11, when I believed the intent was to win. It is now clear, that the Bureaucrats in Washington DC effectively tied the laces of our boots on the ground and caused irreparable damage to countless American families. I have since learned and pay better attention to the outcome of the consequences of the actions our government takes when they try to be the keeper of the world. Following WWII, the choice of war has never been about winning, rather, about the need to participate in some type of Preschool Globalist Group Time- playing a circle jerk of political correctness. The rules of engagement we put on our troops are disgraceful at best. We send our men and women into harm's way - without the tools to win the fight and then cry about the consequences of war. Somewhere along the way, we failed to understand the meaning of the word. Are we there for an Absolute war - Instrumental war - or Agonistic fighting? This is the problem - no one ever asked what type of engagement we were beginning. I do not agree with war - however, if we are going there, then go to win - Period. There is no other alternative in my interpretation. This is the failure we are seeing firsthand today in Afghanistan. The failure to understand the purpose of the fight, with no end in sight. We instead put American soldier's lives on the line- for the longest war in American history - for what? NOTHING!!! Nothing but a global game of tag. Now - we leave millions of dollars of American-made equipment - tanks, weapons, drones - in the hands of the enemy. The enemy, who has declared JIHAD on citizens around the world, including Americans for decades. How utterly ridiculous and a complete insult to the families of those who lost everything. I am grieving today with over 2,000 GOLD STAR families, the mothers, fathers, brothers, sisters, and more whose loved ones gave the last measure of devotion for a fight we never intended to actually win. What about the physical sacrifices of over 20,000 of our wounded brothers and sisters since 2001? History repeats itself for those who fail to learn the lessons provided. I supported troop withdrawal in the region for many reasons - but it had to be done in an intelligent manner with proper planning and knowledge of the possible repercussion of those actions, i.e., the effect our leaving would have on the Afghan people, and our citizens in Afghanistan as well. But - no, the Biden administration gave no regard for anyone's security or safety, our Americans stationed there, or the safety of any others in the region. So now here we are, 20 years later for what? Once again never considering the outcome, what happens now? Terrorism of the rise? Oil and gas prices? The safety of the Middle East, Israel, the United States, The World? Tell me today, how are those globalists, save the world policies working out? As Americans, we should demand that our leaders only and always do what is best for the lives of American citizens. Fight if we must - to defend the United States and our Allies - to the death and complete destruction - if that is what is necessary. If we cannot commit to winning the war then do not go to war! Remember WWII. Had we not made the ultimate decision to fight - and to win - where would we be today? We must learn from our mistakes and not let history repeat itself for future generations. Always putting America First instead of others is the decision I stand behind today and always. I, Laurel Imer, am calling for the Impeachment of the Biden Administration for their blatant Dereliction of Duty in the midst of the Afghanistan Crisis, and I hope you will join me in the fight to Save America and Put America First once again. | == | | == May God Bless You, our troops, our Gold Star Families, and may God Bless the United States of America. Sincerely, Laurel Imer Republican Candidate, CO-07 | == | | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

Peter,
Just days after bragging about his endorsement from President Trump, Governor Lee decides to put our children in harm's way by banning mask mandates in our school districts. This is government overreach at its finest — undermining local officials under the guise of "choice." But now, parents who want to keep their kids safe have no choice but to send them to school where they risk falling sick with a deadly virus.
Bill Lee once boasted of having a strong backbone, but all he's done in office is cave to extremists and play political games. He's our "Hypocrite in Chief," which is why we are working every day to put him out of a job, but we need your help.
Can you chip in now to help us raise the $5,690 we need to meet our mid month deadline so we can replace Bill Lee in 2022? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]

body:
Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=f592dbef8c1d44ffb2721e458fce54ff&_t=PE58ZLEteG2J6s40CEYjkmTd1_B5Xh_1ewlUg1rQXFcFK7ek5OWjNo6pHc7dST_GkYJtsVQFBE1rjawU9XPHXkZQr-XxFESx8BAhFMgXUOtkLrp4E32Xf_22Znkg37qPPY4_38NLH-SJFhwpFagWPiEQJF730BXgmejIu5Tu2Vo%3D)
