---

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f592dbef8c1d44ffb2721e458fce54ff&_e=w91heoVmO_dzIdiQkx9DgvP5uMZOkEsFGTkpaLQ7Ub0CuS9DKbEgtUI5l4Zrabqb1CYrAS4bIpvp7jGnEMsG-Q-lGNq5caOnELFSiZZ93pUJEhyfUg79YBfKSZnVYK7_-a6H3w1wOGwlpGUJvK6WWBUwyMNVa8GaVQaHraGhUajIWwuZgepSwYdJX1S9UXWIteoqIR1Yqg1RYgrU3upYAK3SKOfhOBSCx-FZwfKdgJZ4dBox6ze9nJukDuyy0Qtq6jZosENkuDubsuIyamalqk0Y0MA9IREmxU5BFPfljHpk_dqxnQNwWfAC-uivxkgdwakxBqDrtt2ObhEO-VW-KefZ7qmOMQPwgySwp9e-fKGS7CwokGR-3br_UnsfJt0ClCBZPNsLJdC5_mVOfwovZmnYvZNawGtT4uUmEr1tstpsKmuqSRp_mzb9Sx00DDusE0JOr0mU1XE9vvj9BYyMvVXtEbMUV6CPt6CfWtLrlvcm6TWLg7nLV-2D6B-iAHuC)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f592dbef8c1d44ffb2721e458fce54ff&_e=w91heoVmO_dzIdiQkx9DgvP5uMZOkEsFGTkpaLQ7Ub0CuS9DKbEgtUI5l4Zrabqb1CYrAS4bIpvp7jGnEMsG-Q-lGNq5caOnELFSiZZ93pUJEhyfUg79YBfKSZnVYK7_-a6H3w1wOGwlpGUJvK6WWBUwyMNVa8GaVQaHraGhUajIWwuZgepSwYdJX1S9UXWIteoqIR1Yqg1RYgrU3upYAK3SKOfhOBSCx-FZwfKdgJZ4dBox6ze9nJukDuyy0Qtq6jZosENkuDubsuIyamalqk0Y0MA9IREmxU5BFPfljHoV0tjIBW8JjVUfpKtKsIlKbcNwH0_LxiJlB2igO2q3_m_xpWyR_ar6eric7T7OF-xqtxUidiOM9VG3qkEti-kR3z8DMO7SON9JpU5z9BaEmFIsSxC7NsUbRn-j9pVP_YnZOXS4G-mo9VyU5HT_8cIIzxWjsBv8lcQyXMWTH51gYVD-Hr959MYbI-brACtF_5HoORSwmrLSerRwPtkB04W1)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 17TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f592dbef8c1d44ffb2721e458fce54ff&_e=w91heoVmO_dzIdiQkx9DgvP5uMZOkEsFGTkpaLQ7Ub0CuS9DKbEgtUI5l4Zrabqb1CYrAS4bIpvp7jGnEMsG-Q-lGNq5caOnELFSiZZ93pUJEhyfUg79YBfKSZnVYK7_-a6H3w1wOGwlpGUJvK6WWBUwyMNVa8GaVQaHraGhUajIWwuZgepSwYdJX1S9UXWIteoqIR1Yqg1RYgrU3upYAK3SKOfhOBSCx-FZwfKdgJZ4dBox6ze9nJukDuyy0Qtq6jZosENkuDubsuIyamalqk0Y0MA9IREmxU5BFPfljHoiK5yurEGxtHpFtqpBKiCXBEyw7JW6rNcPPyVUZi6YGz6myad2RpshPojdqqncHpvI3e6s3ZWSDwP1jmvMNB629fKJtn9G_iZTzY6XEM1S0PtDwLTBYQGKd9QqiFgl2ecEJRq73ztxBmUlBPQC8saiiRsZwB1cu4IcPMI3_ScIIn37UslTJTEpZWLB5Lh-giWE-_KntYlVAGxnVXNiZKEP)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f592dbef8c1d44ffb2721e458fce54ff&_e=w91heoVmO_dzIdiQkx9DgvP5uMZOkEsFGTkpaLQ7Ub0CuS9DKbEgtUI5l4Zrabqb1CYrAS4bIpvp7jGnEMsG-Q-lGNq5caOnELFSiZZ93pUJEhyfUg79YBfKSZnVYK7_-a6H3w1wOGwlpGUJvK6WWBUwyMNVa8GaVQaHraGhUajIWwuZgepSwYdJX1S9UXWIteoqIR1Yqg1RYgrU3upYAK3SKOfhOBSCx-FZwfKdgJZ4dBox6ze9nJukDuyy0Qtq6jZosENkuDubsuIyamalqk0Y0MA9IREmxU5BFPfljHpBEvcB8DhhcSayumv7qFVSo4qWwySIPe2LCcQ__zK2cHjsV1nO24-UoF1GktIIxIIK7V1gaKJ8JVV-9g-kTlFmuuUkO88mx0GIY7-GyBYnPLpNtN7BzYJ1bjuTzoDi4T6A-_g68VZc9H5iNY_UVyK9tNEz504Q-x4p8eH93VKykJVzJKRobdriwJWJspTii2b5YakGsTQOW0PkiUxfcwtW)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f592dbef8c1d44ffb2721e458fce54ff&_e=w91heoVmO_dzIdiQkx9DgvP5uMZOkEsFGTkpaLQ7Ub0CuS9DKbEgtUI5l4Zrabqb1CYrAS4bIpvp7jGnEMsG-Q-lGNq5caOnELFSiZZ93pUJEhyfUg79YBfKSZnVYK7_-a6H3w1wOGwlpGUJvK6WWBUwyMNVa8GaVQaHraGhUajIWwuZgepSwYdJX1S9UXWIteoqIR1Yqg1RYgrU3upYAK3SKOfhOBSCx-FZwfKdgJZ4dBox6ze9nJukDuyy0Qtq6jZosENkuDubsuIyamalqk0Y0MA9IREmxU5BFPfljHqYtn4oyQcVRQhVf19GNHVZYsSZGlpQf6bASi-rh40JchkeACeefcasE8Ye94yM2qMuIeTd05txvTAnbKvrCmjThudjo4JaXsU2tcjMvlCsmzulvST4ek25WnDf3Q9mB7GJsImYWeF9li9KmkQF5eZSus-vn-j7N_LsCM2e4ftBuXHVkaeA92gcVe-B14YOQJV705M-Fxk8nc0969ENqHrg)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f592dbef8c1d44ffb2721e458fce54ff&_e=w91heoVmO_dzIdiQkx9DgvP5uMZOkEsFGTkpaLQ7Ub0CuS9DKbEgtUI5l4Zrabqb1CYrAS4bIpvp7jGnEMsG-Q-lGNq5caOnELFSiZZ93pUJEhyfUg79YBfKSZnVYK7_-a6H3w1wOGwlpGUJvK6WWBUwyMNVa8GaVQaHraGhUajIWwuZgepSwYdJX1S9UXWIteoqIR1Yqg1RYgrU3upYAK3SKOfhOBSCx-FZwfKdgJZ4dBox6ze9nJukDuyy0Qtq6jZosENkuDubsuIyamalqk0Y0MA9IREmxU5BFPfljHqSuKna4t06S8OU3HByPcGZiT07sttNTgoZ3pkpbcHxQcf1b_94WOxs8x37sSCrJPW5T-lC9S8LYfFA7D411b9FCifKrZcsGydQAmWjS6t-KuM1KlC9jH3I86zlYnRP5IVCUhZSMsI5vWUG1qJea0_c0tYIIHJ1Na2Px2IPgY8pXLUafxu0chfv_E4aZsJ0fi6umJcJhxm4kBcILTSOk7xQ)

body:

clean_body: But we’ve gotten permission to extend the deadline until midnight tonight. | Peter, We’re going to get right to the point, because there’s no time to waste. That means that we were out-raised by the socialist Democrats who are masking our kids, rigging our elections, and curtailing our Second Amendment rights. 1. Visit the Secretary of State’s website at [**https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=e73abc49a9fe449c8c076e7214f860f2&_e=eVX5LfaQh78Y61riiH3KXSwn6MIh1Jx9onqlWSQZz9UeZYCalQ3h3Y6ZElSJ2-JnYizXx01bxBEGMTjPH5Tejx0sCpe-KCNReL0FzAc8Er-WyPoMc59uEBj-d44o1_IkQSJNzZwL5KoczuppVm2NN-KfvmE5h6d52mrPKMUhbaAdFYlGqWZhkldrk44tv49xz6AcMKkdShEXBmyYsmXuCP5OcNQB6ycoE3m_jJBCP1tGyVhZX51UmaUh4Flgn11_3gV5PsK2hLFkaaJRA1H6o3WN_GwbCELiuEzkfbTc74g%3D).

7. Enter and verify your email address. Click "You may provide my email address to the candidate" if you would like to provide our campaign your email address.
8. Click the green "Yes. I want to sign this petition" button.
9. Click the green "Yes. I want to sign this petition" button again.

| Peter,
---
| Did you see the latest multi-trillion-dollar measure out of Washington that our kids will need to pay back?
Democrats introduced a PATHETIC "infrastructure" bill that ultimately just pushed through their Critical Race Theory agenda. Only 10% of this legislation goes towards real infrastructure, which our American industries desperately need!
But what was even MORE pathetic was that some weak Republicans fell for this old trick and made the Left's trillion-dollar "Woke" legislation possible. [This is why we need STRONG Republican leadership in the Senate!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eWBCfqTWTtRfVeHedHC198DndxpxrV2Ni0ZIBSJ3dx8T5yJQdlR_aEfMxOraTIJLhHowCAi7KxLFTJ5UDt8vQeXaQMxpcLMCl9-38a4pA-S34Sw5L8vnX2wwa3LNubs0GaY5ysW5kyo6HL87gdUSQ6bB-Jjdp7f-8wS7qMLZZa14VRaS3pWO2HlHD1m4k5UtL3AMoo-iIDE=&c=EHirJUyE9K18ZtIyo-xLsfWi668Ku9GiRknSxmP4nYzp1_w4rooJ3w==&ch=GtKEyLSQmw-LymS8o91uUDguq15IpcSvQ0U4qMp80jCbiRTHzzMxng==)
---
| | | [PITCH IN HERE FOR NEW LEADERSHIP](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eWBCfqTWTtRfVeHedHC198DndxpxrV2Ni0ZIBSJ3dx8T5yJQdlR_aEfMxOraTIJLhHowCAi7KxLFTJ5UDt8vQeXaQMxpcLMCl9-38a4pA-S34Sw5L8vnX2wwa3LNubs0GaY5ysW5kyo6HL87gdUSQ6bB-Jjdp7f-8wS7qMLZZa14VRaS3pWO2HlHD1m4k5UtL3AMoo-iIDE=&c=EHirJUyE9K18ZtIyo-xLsfWi668Ku9GiRknSxmP4nYzp1_w4rooJ3w==&ch=GtKEyLSQmw-LymS8o91uUDguq15IpcSvQ0U4qMp80jCbiRTHzzMxng==)

| Apparently, this is what "bipartisanship" gets us - playing the Left's games as they steer us towards their Critical Race Theory ideas and misuse trillions of our tax dollars.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/daa82e74fca8/join-us-tomorrow-morning-for-a-major-announcement-5630073?e=c2296cffff)
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d33e3cd51b&e=c2296cffff)
---
| Friend, This race in Florida’s 13th Congressional District is one of the most important in the entire country. Republicans need to flip just **FIVE SEATS** to take back the House from Speaker Nancy Pelosi, and provide a much-needed check on the far-left Biden-Harris administration! Here in FL-13, Democrat congressman Charlie Crist is vacating the seat to run against our great Republican Governor Ron DeSantis - meaning we could be one of those five key seats! The work we put in here could save our conservative values and the American Dream nationwide - _but it won’t be an easy task..._ Democrats and their top donors are sure to pour in MILLIONS into this race, trying to keep a hold of power in my district and maintain their one-party rule in our nation’s capital. **We can stop them - but it’s up to all of us to make this huge Republican victory a reality!** [**Can I count on you?**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=dedff330c8&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a6b56ece69&e=c2296cffff)
---
| The trends we’ve been seeing with Democrats in charge are too concerning to not take immediate action. Biden’s policies are spreading Socialism and inflation, and WE’VE been the ones footing the bill with spiked gas and grocery prices. He’s also STOPPED wall construction, and now we have armed illegals crossing an Open Border, putting our communities at risk!

**Then, just this past weekend, we witnessed the fall of Afghanistan as the Biden Administration struggled to get Americans safely out of the country. ** **It’s clear that we need leaders in Congress who will push back on Joe Biden’s agenda - not enable it.** That’s why I hope you’ll join me and my team as we look to become one of the campaigns that helps take back the House next fall. [**It’s up to us to SAVE OUR COUNTRY!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c2e13d80d3&e=c2296cffff)
---

---
| Thank you for your support today, _Amanda Makki_

He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of August 16th: JUST SAY NO to medical mandates!
body:
| |
---
This week, our focus is on the Just Say No protests on August 28th. [America needs you to organize a protest in your area.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI5LWQ1OGE2ZTdlMGVhMzQ2Njk4MTYyOTI2NWFkNmQxMzU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTk1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=i3jo2IEUwghLUqHoxeGRQA) Some places will have one big protest. Other areas might have a bunch of simple sign-waving events. Some places will have smaller events earlier in the day, leading up to a larger, central event later in the evening. Whatever works is great. The important thing is that they get organized.

We know some of you are thinking, I can’t organize an event. We’re here to say, you are wrong! You can! And we are here to help you. We will be holding multiple calls over the next two weeks to walk you through the process.

Here’s the deal. The CDC is compromised, as are the courts. We cannot depend on anyone but ourselves to stop what’s coming.

We are at a crossroads in the United States. The people with power are saying that human beings do not have a right to say no to an injection of a substance into their bodies. Whether the vaccine is safe or unsafe is irrelevant. We have a human right to decide what chemicals we want to keep out of our bodies.

We have a right to breathe freely and earn a living, to support our families, and raise our children without interference from the state.

If we comply with these mandates, **what comes next?**

We just saw reports that the Biden Administration is considering restricting interstate commerce and travel for Americans who choose not to get the Covid vaccine.

Whatever comes next will not be easier to fight. It will be harder. The time is now to Just Say No.

Just Say No to medical mandates and say YES to liberty!
|
---
[**Please sign up today to organize a protest** ,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI5LWQ1OGE2ZTdlMGVhMzQ2Njk4MTYyOTI2NWFkNmQxMzU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTk1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=FylBtrg7FnD89TADjgn0xg) and we promise you that we will help you every step of the way, including a detailed how-to guide that you can download!

Right now, we are focused on organizers, but after we get enough organizers, we will help attendees find a protest to attend.
[HOST A PROTEST](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI5LWQ1OGE2ZTdlMGVhMzQ2Njk4MTYyOTI2NWFkNmQxMzU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9ub3Rjb25zZW50Lz9taWQ9NDQxOTUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=YZ7Au-3td_3HN6_wwBR2CQ)
|
---
Tea Party Patriots Action Honorary Chairman Jenny Beth Martin [released the following statement](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI5LWQ1OGE2ZTdlMGVhMzQ2Njk4MTYyOTI2NWFkNmQxMzU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9uLW5ld3Mvc2VuYXRvcnMtbWFuY2hpbi1hbmQtc2luZW1hLXNob3VsZC10YWtlLXRoZWlyLWNvbmNlcm5zLXdpdGgtMy01dC1idWRnZXQtcmVjb25jaWxpYXRpb24tYmlsbC1zZXJpb3VzbHktYW5kLXNvLXNob3VsZC1ldmVyeW9uZS1lbHNlLz9taWQ9NDQxOTUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=hqTIRSztsAIhpISDwHdRIw) in regards to Senators Manchin and Sinema expressing their concerns with the Democrats’ $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill.

_“Our nation is already more than $29 trillion in debt as we speak, yet Democrats continue to ramp up the reckless spending as they push for a $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill. Senators Manchin and Sinema have raised serious concerns about this bill. Sinema said last week she would not vote for $3.5 trillion, and Manchin said this morning that it is ‘simply irresponsible to continue spending at levels more suited to respond to a Great Depression ...’ They are absolutely right. There's no need to spend another dime after, as he noted, we've already pumped $5 trillion in new deficit spending into the economy over the past year. As if on cue with his stated concern about inflation, today's Consumer Price Index report shows a big spike in inflation, which is a hidden tax on everyone. But will Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema hold to this? Will responsible actions follow their words? They and other sensible Democrats, as well as all Republicans, must unite to stop the reckless spending right here, right now.”_
|
---
The Biden Border Crisis is out of control...and, behind closed doors, top Biden Administration officials are even admitting this.

In newly leaked audio, Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas was heard saying at these unprecedented levels the crisis is "unsustainable" and that they're "going to lose."

This after he announced publicly migrant encounters with border patrol agents in July topped 212,000.

[Fox News has the story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjI5LWQ1OGE2ZTdlMGVhMzQ2Njk4MTYyOTI2NWFkNmQxMzU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvbWF5b3JrYXMtbGVha2VkLWF1ZGlvLWJvcmRlcj9taWQ9NDQxOTUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=I72LuTk6tRMEJHpOH3tCEg)

clean_body: | | This week, our focus is on the Just Say No protests on August 28th. Some places will have one big protest. Other areas might have a bunch of simple sign-waving events. Some places will have smaller events earlier in the day, leading up to a larger, central event later in the evening. Whatever works is great. The important thing is that they get organized. We know some of you are thinking, I can’t organize an event. We’re here to say, you are wrong! You can! And we are here to help you. We will be holding multiple calls over the next two weeks to walk you through the process. Here’s the deal. The CDC is compromised, as are the courts. We cannot depend on anyone but ourselves to stop what’s coming. We are at a crossroads in the United States. The people with power are saying that human beings do not have a right to say no to an injection of a substance into their bodies. Whether the vaccine is safe or unsafe is irrelevant. We have a human right to decide what chemicals we want to keep out of our bodies. We have a right to breathe freely and earn a living, to support our families, and raise our children without interference from the state. If we comply with these mandates, what comes next? We just saw reports that the Biden Administration is considering restricting interstate commerce and travel for Americans who choose not to get the Covid vaccine. Whatever comes next will not be easier to fight. It will be harder. The time is now to Just Say No. Just Say No to medical mandates and say YES to liberty! | and we promise you that we will help you every step of the way, including a detailed how-to guide that you can download! Right now, we are focused on organizers, but after we get enough organizers, we will help attendees find a protest to attend. | Tea Party Patriots Action Honorary Chairman Jenny Beth Martin in regards to Senators Manchin and Sinema expressing their concerns with the Democrats’ $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill. “Our nation is already more than $29 trillion in debt as we speak, yet Democrats continue to ramp up the reckless spending as they push for a $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill. Senators Manchin and Sinema have raised serious concerns about this bill. Sinema said last week she would not vote for $3.5 trillion, and Manchin said this morning that it is ‘simply irresponsible to continue spending at levels more suited to respond to a Great Depression ...’ They are absolutely right. There's no need to spend another dime after, as he noted, we've already pumped $5 trillion in new deficit spending into the economy over the past year. As if on cue with his stated concern about inflation, today's Consumer Price Index report shows a big spike in inflation, which is a hidden tax on everyone. But will Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema hold to this? Will responsible actions follow their words? They and other sensible Democrats, as well as all Republicans, must unite to stop the reckless spending right here, right now.” | The Biden Border Crisis is out of control...and, behind closed doors, top Biden Administration officials are even admitting this. In newly leaked audio, Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas was heard saying at these unprecedented levels the crisis is "unsustainable" and that they're "going to lose." This after he announced publicly migrant encounters with border patrol agents in July topped 212,000. | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. subject: Skarlatos: Republican veterans to serve as a check on Biden

body:
I don’t think that someone who hasn’t been to Afghanistan militarily should be in charge of the withdrawal frankly I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=c408d435d1e5497fa9e2ecda62a28809&_e=wZV53X3rbRcV_bFShqyLaE7nvymhxJUXBXD7jmYyz25S-l4aPdCwC0zmBOUGJ3GDQCcTz05A1Vs8xdJh9sT63dfeEqcaPl9Pv1e7TYO0C4s9e-a5pxQMV8QVDkJxUNTdDq3cRGBL3dc5OnCD1W4926eV_vCO63Q_kXfOqySAP9XNDXXH_9haknZUIBxvVuPQ8W68YX0GXbgNmW3_EITAox8fOrT6MGn7uHaKOQINH3i162MuGPrep0HGGDiT8oF-fj_0zoj4CVFMAABP2uyoAgMckB0rdVKhdeQA6icsF1WHwbzsQHiHtJrE2zzG-J3QDqsAKVOi-q7LSrw9mv6_avRxL0I4_viqoCWprOTwydScywj0KVMTX-QtvYQI-zEaeU3twzdXQo4xkuPM32LV2wkvYpoTEqhZfCTfgHSorveLHeZzk_zT7fR4xlvDR033qD4si4PamamW9MNyuxUaqw%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

**Oregon Republican Alek Skarlatos** , a U.S. Army National Guard veteran, told Breitbart News in an exclusive interview Monday that **Republicans veterans would serve as a check to President Joe Biden’s disastrous foreign policy if they take back the House majority in the 2022 midterm elections**.

**Skarlatos, widely known for his heroic stopping of a heavily armed attacker on a Paris-bound train in 2015, spoke to Breitbart News as Biden defended his planned withdrawal of Afghanistan**.

Biden admitted during his presser that the collapse of the Afghanistan government to the Taliban fell more “quickly” than anticipated.

Skarlatos — who completed a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan with the U.S. Army National Guard’s 186th Infantry Regiment — said he had supported the withdrawal of troops from Afghanistan since 2011, but that Biden’s plan was a “ _disaster_.”

“ _There’s a lot of different ways we could have done it – really any way else other than how we did it. I think would have been a lot better. We definitely should have put more emphasis on getting our men and equipment out, and, of course, all of our Afghan allies interpreters, Afghan Special Forces that help us out along the way as wel_ l,” Skarlatos told Breitbart News.

Skarlatos then charged that if Republicans were in control of the House majority, they would not have let this debacle happen. He noted that many Republican veterans, such as himself, are running to serve as a check on Biden’s foreign policy and overall agenda.

The Oregon conservative said, “ _We’ve been to Afghanistan, and we understand the situation ... We have an appreciation for the people that helped us in Afghanistan. And I think we would have made sure everybody that deserved to get out or wanted to get out before we just abandon the country like it seems like we have. So, I think that with all the veterans running for Congress that we’ve just never let this happen_.”

Republicans hope to retake the House majority by recruiting veterans.

Skarlatos hopes to unseat Rep. Peter DeFazio (D-OR) in Oregon’s fourth district.

House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) has to defend her**historically slim majority** during the 2022 midterm elections. Recruiting veterans such as Skarlatos, Van Orden, Bell, and Crane could help Republicans take back control of the Speaker’s gavel as Biden and congressional Democrats continue to grapple with Biden’s Afghanistan debacle. The Afghanistan withdrawal could even impact the 2022 midterms, as some veterans have attacked Biden and Democrats over their failed leadership.

Sean Parnell, an Army veteran running for the Senate in Pennsylvania, said that “leaders lead” and do not “pass the buck” and blame others. He slammed Biden for blaming former President Donald Trump and others for the debacle that has unfolded under his administration.

Skarlatos said that Republicans could do better at foreign policy and other issues in power. He emphasized that many politicians could have seen the incoming Biden withdrawal debacle occur.

“ _I just think Republicans do a better job of just about everything. I don’t think that someone who hasn’t been to Afghanistan militarily should be in charge of the withdrawal frankly_ ,” he said.

Skarlatos said, “ _Anyone that has spent time in Afghanistan knew that this was going to happen — play out pretty much exactly how it has, so why was no one prepared for it? I’m not a high-ranking general. I could have told you this exact sentence that happened_.”

_This article originally appeared on Breitbart news on Monday, August 16th.

subject: What do Hillary Clinton and Joe Biden have in common?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
They both would rather sleep through terrorist attacks than perform the duties that their jobs require. They both sleep soundly during terrorist attacks. It's time to hold Democrats accountable for their failures. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bafcd49c4b94290b1895bb4fd09efd7&_e=dIXNjNaKI9kUnm0Efw4zTK3UCaySe7eJ-u4DssSyIO0Y9kfTjS1FlhkWRCfXzHrJF8SIu7boLIv1ky-qrBaHrrWOHGQgXDZO4GA1l8NO6doDwn5HGWJTkMTNbaY1SlqUIseD1TO4UiMOwGEUPQUb1NO-ZkUO4PSgWhTlLxjD8lFLQTaqlFjIh1e3XJffI_NKYrPtUVYmyITLFs7phjt9vCdlytolHRhROx-fspwaCdR8PvECZCpIGtf_pfO-CD0nar-cGCbOgduUX-TozJGs7KftR2CJn1uYcM3UkRNxyoAnD4Bku3A97rflWQLQC4D2Sc6ie94rb5B-kOI6K5U_zmHjGsZHXTNf-__KmVcZ60O-KTk7ZPYmLGhO0rpLOCZeGzNG1FF-v3TuuogI-ASOVoGWWzwuIsyutdgfgfKV4kvLus92Dbw7iI7_jRZGEAcAFy0hpIW3G2Jnn0Brdj6IP3PyJMgilm9mih0H8aaYMUTtm_t7xYap7iMkXpp2Z0Up2OSg6w_U7sIGxbpvwNgUpw%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

My heart is heavy this morning as I write this email to you. As a veteran of the Army and the United States intelligence community **who deployed to Afghanistan 3 times** over the course of nine years, I’m watching in horror as desperate families cling to U.S. military aircraft in hopes of finding safe haven from the Taliban.

**I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withdrawal, I mean it**. President Biden clearly misled the American public in July when he said that “ _**There’s going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the United States embassy**_.”

But what angers me more is that I know men like me, who serve in our special forces, will bear the brunt of Biden’s decision to pull out of Afghanistan in such a reckless manner. How do I know? **Because I spent six years tracking down the Islamic terrorists who killed our Ambassador in Benghazi, Libya on September 11th, 2012 while Hillary Clinton slept.**

**This is not a withdrawal; this is an abandonment leading to a humanitarian crisis of the likes we have not seen this century**. My heart is breaking for my brothers that I lost on the battlefield, **and for the members of the special forces who are going to be responsible for cleaning up this mess in the near future**.

This crisis perfectly sums up why I’m running for Congress, and today **[I’m asking you to lend your support to my campaign](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bafcd49c4b94290b1895bb4fd09efd7&_e=dIXNjNaKI9kUnm0Efw4zTK3UCaySe7eJ-u4DssSyIO0Y9kfTjS1FlhkWRCfXzHrJF8SIu7boLIv1ky-qrBaHrrWOHGQgXDZO4GA1l8NO6doDwn5HGWJTkMTNbaY1SlqUIseD1TO4UiMOwGEUPQUb1NO-ZkUO4PSgWhTlLxjD8lFLQTaqlFjIh1e3XJffI_NKYrPtUVYmyITLFs7phjt9vCdlytolHRhROx-fspwaCdR8PvECZCpIGtf_pfO-CD0nar-cGCbOgduUX-TozJGs7KftR2CJn1uYcM3UkRNxyoDxWgxHJNJHvG5a7h2XbXoqp8dhUAAreXDrAMTZgpDaFYQ24qgxd_RypHzDaFXTCNB2sHVTt69l_9uZVl_cYyARJ3cDRmsIpMaemYrCw_t5vta-pAxKTE0-Itot_nN8MuN7l98_7m7AMtIqZ0f4aK3ZBx-X8IavFpA6_fNLBq9q8Xg_1d_X-AKEXfZvtC4h4hA6JHvh0pQQW9TKE3AYN18kR2y3BpAYAOQcgdZg2QWk4Q%3D%3D)**. I don’t have to run for Congress, I’ve got a great job and a newborn son at home. But this absolute shit storm that Biden created should keep us all up at night.**I’ve interrogated Taliban terrorists at Bagram Airfield in Kabul, I can tell you on good authority that Biden was well aware that something like this could happen**.

| [**STOP BIDEN
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **› › **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bafcd49c4b94290b1895bb4fd09efd7&_e=dIXNjNaKI9kUnm0Efw4zTK3UCaySe7eJ-u4DssSyIO0Y9kfTjS1FlhkWRCfXzHrJF8SIu7boLIv1ky-qrBaHrrWOHGQgXDZO4GA1l8NO6doDwn5HGWJTkMTNbaY1SlqUIseD1TO4UiMOwGEUPQUb1NO-ZkUO4PSgWhTlLxjD8lFLQTaqlFjIh1e3XJffI_NKYrPtUVYmyITLFs7phjt9vCdlytolHRhROx-fspwaCdR8PvECZCpIGtf_pfO-CD0nar-cGCbOgduUX-TozJGs7KftR2CJn1uYcM3UkRNxyoAfQVH4nTxuQXbDGO_LTWXUy8QiNqhNKiJ6Sx2B4RQu6cGKeKrFU3uB-rtaQwAUAK4fSDS9ZbFKPbXyAiEvVzLsJnuKs0Rq5es6DBbE7wsR_GjKNqxhE7TApGF1GGbIngiPqE8-6qWrYHR3aBTIAp_5rOmdQA3WjX3CXHb2WqJR1st-RxbkHPwCGoNCBHQrI05U3fIX4YPbqbHwNd5_G-byHij_ePhKY_Tp_fQGrZP5vg%3D%3D)

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bafcd49c4b94290b1895bb4fd09efd7&_e=dIXNjNaKI9kUnm0Efw4zTK3UCaySe7eJ-u4DssSyIO0Y9kfTjS1FlhkWRCfXzHrJF8SIu7boLIv1ky-qrBaHrrWOHGQgXDZO4GA1l8NO6doDwn5HGWJTkMTNbaY1SlqUIseD1TO4UiMOwGEUPQUb1NO-ZkUO4PSgWhTlLxjD8lFLQTaqlFjIh1e3XJffI_NKYrPtUVYmyITLFs7phjt9vCdlytolHRhROx-fspwaCdR8PvECZCpIGtf_pfO-CD0nar-cGCbOgduUX-TozJGs7KftR2CJn1uYcM3UkRNxyoCTGJ9do2yPDtBuligpX7NrrwsdNAaW0PWJriblSe0O-wbPI3CDZrTp-9NyNbK6Qk0LBv0MI2oxmPOMedbedTmnjErSJV1GTqOJwA3oKrI6ukTboxNFoXxzs1shFiH9UagZN7TrzD6VL8jUMWh4vQusNo8iuE5g_5-6Lrl0XFtYytHDUnyN3OPS9PfbOTlzPvyrBvdha_P4Z86oVP3_JJ0KQfrKEmycVXcrgnCVL9V8Cg%3D%3D)
An article in the Wall Street Journal summed up the situation rather succinctly saying, “ _**The jihadists the U.S. toppled 20 years ago for sheltering Osama bin Laden will not fly their flag over the U.S. Embassy building on the 20th anniversary of 9/11**_.”

**The Taliban’s advances come as no surprise to us veterans of the Afghanistan conflict, I personally have deployed to Afghanistan 3 times during both my time in the Army and within the Intelligence Community**. We all knew that the Afghan National Army and Uniformed Police was an ineffective fighting force propped by U.S. logistics, U.S. air support and U.S. funding. Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "**leader** " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. **Mr. President, the blood is on your hands**.

Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. **This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel**.

**Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need**. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that “ _The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions_.”

[**STOP BIDEN
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **› › **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bafcd49c4b94290b1895bb4fd09efd7&_e=dIXNjNaKI9kUnm0Efw4zTK3UCaySe7eJ-u4DssSyIO0Y9kfTjS1FlhkWRCfXzHrJF8SIu7boLIv1ky-qrBaHrrWOHGQgXDZO4GA1l8NO6doDwn5HGWJTkMTNbaY1SlqUIseD1TO4UiMOwGEUPQUb1NO-ZkUO4PSgWhTlLxjD8lFLQTaqlFjIh1e3XJffI_NKYrPtUVYmyITLFs7phjt9vCdlytolHRhROx-fspwaCdR8PvECZCpIGtf_pfO-CD0nar-cGCbOgduUX-TozJGs7KftR2CJn1uYcM3UkRNxyoAzK09lkp2BaKd7-ML11QW6zI3sAb-iuG31u2w29-uOiiqqVU4QAa6v6v2wt5-CRZb17vUBWgiCsIt_YKmUdoKuT4N4C3YstloPoaWa8xHeh8HbVgPME4oKqg7EbAe35EPg4fQmsB6ff0c82G7ma-6qtJC8sfEeBvZl43U_VDbcDMyMxoaw66UH-9nx_PYd9sDGGGRy3xl1nciqgcQO72_jp9aJYtFI3soNBRdM0dSP6Q%3D%3D)
---

Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we’re seeing unfold today. **President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have**.

**[Today I’m asking you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress, because I assure you that if I’m given the opportunity to serve, I’ll make sure Biden and Pelosi are held to account for these foolish decisions](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bafcd49c4b94290b1895bb4fd09efd7&_e=dIXNjNaKI9kUnm0Efw4zTK3UCaySe7eJ-u4DssSyIO0Y9kfTjS1FlhkWRCfXzHrJF8SIu7boLIv1ky-qrBaHrrWOHGQgXDZO4GA1l8NO6doDwn5HGWJTkMTNbaY1SlqUIseD1TO4UiMOwGEUPQUb1NO-ZkUO4PSgWhTlLxjD8lFLQTaqlFjIh1e3XJffI_NKYrPtUVYmyITLFs7phjt9vCdlytolHRhROx-fspwaCdR8PvECZCpIGtf_pfO-CD0nar-cGCbOgduUX-TozJGs7KftR2CJn1uYcM3UkRNxyoDnUJ3egV7dFuOG_RPB5mN2jrB3s2Yx0_4bZBMfeRKm_BYLGJ4GhvgCUft-CYDo-KyfdGUqjcAme7hkHUgsyCFrWKdPUGSdaaNC1mUFMh9GghC4rTg39ksB7D3oGBKHNzyVeZ3wKbLJ6CrdjK7li3tk6q-FTKIQ0kajLDLPizJ9_yJc-S18jDdErA891D8QWtd21otV3hbkIxEAgAK6LPIYPpgAEmIGENFrSYsC4bwcVA%3D%3D)**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bafcd49c4b94290b1895bb4fd09efd7&_e=dIXNjNaKI9kUnm0Efw4zTK3UCaySe7eJ-u4DssSyIO0Y9kfTjS1FlhkWRCfXzHrJF8SIu7boLIv1ky-qrBaHrrWOHGQgXDZO4GA1l8NO6doDwn5HGWJTkMTNbaY1SlqUIseD1TO4UiMOwGEUPQUb1NO-ZkUO4PSgWhTlLxjD8lFLQTaqlFjIh1e3XJffI_NKYrPtUVYmyITLFs7phjt9vCdlytolHRhROx-fspwaCdR8PvECZCpIGtf_pfO-CD0nar-cGCbOgduUX-TozJGs7KftR2CJn1uYcM3UkRNxyoDrrW7UZZnce3t8nB-59-O6rG7u7ZREqpnGDbjqrQDC66TpggrlrVjOMSU25FAWWq1W-fM-iZKvLqYWoZhjIpuXgawclQPyysBFkW_PkEAlGu2pMmYy0Y0_RnY3Ted3ocpnh-wOok5RW1Vx4o7YavO9wdG0PQxvynFOqaANpl9xu6pFnWCfiuRJXxJiSIQUYMczeRwOUQQkJ0sAqZXXTCpI4_f7NTuu_67jcsRgkEjbEw%3D%3D)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4bafcd49c4b94290b1895bb4fd09efd7&_e=dIXNjNaKI9kUnm0Efw4zTK3UCaySe7eJ-u4DssSyIO0Y9kfTjS1FlhkWRCfXzHrJF8SIu7boLIv1ky-qrBaHrrWOHGQgXDZO4GA1l8NO6doDwn5HGWJTkMTNbaY1SlqUIseD1TO4UiMOwGEUPQUb1NO-ZkUO4PSgWhTlLxjD8lFLQTaqlFjIh1e3XJffI_NKYrPtUVYmyITLFs7phjt9vCdlytolHRhROx-fspwaCdR8PvECZCpIGtf_pfO-CD0nar-cGCbOgduUX-TozJGs7KftR2CJn1uYcM3UkRNxyoDZU-g5eWufrJcM_fVqYmTu8m5NUvNT3cWdnz3vALDSnG5Irl8c4qnnxg5IBQcfBokuPZmqqCAYkhA5x4rTlxr1g6Hqtsb4_62fmZQ48P_m8zz4SRhDEuTPhJvSYoAdKFNNCWsK8uD0lJTdYUYpYuLZUvYB5wlJQGpEBDWGyGD8zfFYeWdwTXiF8w8NgrWknJxpdpp5PUkcLgxydayih4hz5mC_tm0-tKizYB-6NKafOA%3D%3D)
---

**Having been to Afghanistan three times** I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. **We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban**.

While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure.

For America
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I served in Afghanistan. Joe Biden Is Lying.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58149301:6KaHMUlwN:m:1:3253819041:8DA39E8C3620EEC0B02278DEF1FD8856:r)
---
| Peter,

I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Since then, many have asked me if it was worth it. Here's what I tell them:

Those of us that served, we fought for our country. We fought for those on our left and right, and we'll keep our heads high knowing that.

But Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. And now, he's even blaming Donald Trump for the disaster Joe Biden himself caused.

Joe Biden is a liar, and he deserves 100% of the blame for the oncoming humanitarian crisis.

So, in a minute, I'm going to ask you to [join me in fighting to defeat Joe Biden](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58149301:6KaHMUlwN:m:1:3253819041:8DA39E8C3620EEC0B02278DEF1FD8856:r), but first let me tell you how I know he's lying...

On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. I'd step left...and then right...left...and then right. Then...BANG!

The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. And every day since then when I wake up, I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home.

One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America.

Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. Instead, he is more focused on the "optics" of the situation. Trying to blame everyone but himself.

**Another lesson I learned in the Army is that leaders take responsibility for their actions. Joe Biden is refusing to do that, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title. **

[If you agree, please help me hold him accountable and stop his disastrous America Last agenda](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58149301:6KaHMUlwN:m:1:3253819041:8DA39E8C3620EEC0B02278DEF1FD8856:r):

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Since then, many have asked me if it was worth it. Here's what I tell them: Those of us that served, we fought for our country. We fought for those on our left and right, and we'll keep our heads high knowing that. But Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. And now, he's even blaming Donald Trump for the disaster Joe Biden himself caused. Joe Biden is a liar, and he deserves 100% of the blame for the oncoming humanitarian crisis. So, in a minute, I'm going to ask you to , but first let me tell you how I know he's lying... On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. I'd step left...and then right...left...and then right. Then...BANG! The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. And every day since then when I wake up, I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home. One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America. Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. Instead, he is more focused on the "optics" of the situation. Trying to blame everyone but himself. Another lesson I learned in the Army is that leaders take responsibility for their actions. Joe Biden is refusing to do that, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title. : | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $100" | "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT" | This cause is incredibly personal to me, and the stakes couldn't be higher. name: Marisa Wood For Congress
subject: Beating McCarthy in his own district.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34225256/301304751/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWNlYzQ1OS1hZWZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j2X0vQTSSq8pEnWs_d0hhHe9TCSe3I79m7GdfNgd3aw=)
Friend --

In the 1950s, Senator Joe McCarthy accused the government of being run by Communists. His goal? Deceive America to advance his own career.

Fast forward 70 years.

Donald Trump lied about the election, and another McCarthy is trying to gaslight the country about what's really going on. Kevin McCarthy blocked the independent investigation into the insurrection. He's protecting racists, anti-vaxxers, and conspiracy theorists, all while claiming the real problem is the "Radical Left."

**Let's call this what it really is. McCarthyism 2.0.**

Kevin needs to be held accountable, and we certainly can't let him anywhere near the Speaker's gavel. That's why we're on a mission to expose him and beat him in his own backyard.

clean_body: | = Friend -- In the 1950s, Senator Joe McCarthy accused the government of being run by Communists. His goal? Deceive America to advance his own career. Fast forward 70 years. Donald Trump lied about the election, and another McCarthy is trying to gaslight the country about what's really going on. Kevin McCarthy blocked the independent investigation into the insurrection. He's protecting racists, anti-vaxxers, and conspiracy theorists, all while claiming the real problem is the "Radical Left." Let's call this what it really is. McCarthyism 2.0. Kevin needs to be held accountable, and we certainly can't let him anywhere near the Speaker's gavel. That's why we're on a mission to expose him and beat him in his own backyard. We're going to need a TON of people chipping in from across the country in order to run a historic ground game in CA-23. name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c386%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=grYLhVA8ld1MVL%2fwG9VWSw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65933%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MTXQwZX299G3nrSoeItbVQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65934%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YHJcE%2f29ho4J6infm%2ftG9Q&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65934%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YHJcE%2f29ho4J6infm%2ftG9Q&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c386%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=grYLhVA8ld1MVL%2fwG9VWSw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c386%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=grYLhVA8ld1MVL%2fwG9VWSw&sysid=1)

subject: update
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team,

It’s been a busy August so far, and I want to give you an overview:

1. New public polling shows DeSantis underwater with independents. We have a clear path to win this race.
2. DeSantis is doubling down on his Trump-style response to the pandemic. He’s attacking the CDC, the Biden administration, and local school districts that are trying to keep kids safe.
3. He’s still raising millions from GOP donors across the country, so we’ll need all hands on deck to defeat him next year.

Team, we can win this race, but only with your help. Please click here to chip in if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-personal-request]

DeSantis is gaining national attention right now for all the wrong reasons. COVID cases are rising, and he refuses to accept ANY responsibility.

Instead, he’s blocking measures to keep our kids safe, threatening our economic recovery by fighting with the cruise industry over vaccines, and shouting at the Biden administration whenever he can.

DeSantis will do ANYTHING to boost his standing with Trump’s base, and we need to stop him. Please click here to chip in and help us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-personal-request]

With Gratitude,
Stefanie

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Call your Representative and demand they pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (HR4) ASAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34226726/301308741/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmQ5Y2Y2NC1iNGZmLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NJ4tcAujBSvoXBLOLsIDWOioXJUPUqLZcg7_9HF_S-U=&emci=9e8f464f-b3ff-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9bd9cf64-b4ff-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, Today was a historic day for voting rights, as Alabama Congresswoman Terri Sewell officially introduced the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (HR4) in the U.S. House of Representatives. The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is landmark legislation, befitting its name and the legacy of Congressman John Lewis, that would implement historic and urgently needed protections of the freedom to vote. Here’s the deal: We need both the **For the People Act** AND the **John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** in order to fight back against the slate of anti-voter bills passed in state legislatures and to protect voters from future attacks on their freedom to vote. With redistricting around the corner, it’s imperative that the House pass the **John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** when they come back into session on the 23rd, so that the Senate is able to vote on both the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act as soon as they return from recess. **We need you to call your U.S. Representative at 833-465-7142 and demand that they pass HR4, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act—immediately.** Below are some key points to emphasize when calling your Representatives about the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. _**What to Say To Your Representatives**_ _Our democracy is in crisis. It is essential that both the**John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** and the **For the People Act** become law before state legislatures and commissions formally approve new redistricting maps. We need urgent federal action to secure fair districts, protect voters from partisan gerrymandering, and ensure their voices are heard. **I’m counting on you to pass HR4 as soon as you return to DC.**_ **Want some more information?** Feel free to share the following with your Representatives: _Americans across party lines support common sense national standards to protect the freedom to vote, and ensure all eligible voters are able to make their voices heard._ _The House must take immediate action to pass the**John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** in order to protect voters from future attacks on their freedom to vote and ensure fair districts. _ _Together, the**John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** and the **For the People Act** are key tools in protecting the freedom to vote across the country—and particularly for protecting people of color from voter suppression._ Thank you for your support and activism, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: 6,588 votes stood between me and Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
To put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ed2e890ac3934d8e8e1be503b4ca0c18&_e=cL4kJvodQgXoVASymHv1F98ri4HPXap7wgulVmKmZJjusI61yXTSHI8VJ1SOjPbmvM0cQ7XR7zakjA_d9evGCkZTorhknMAe904rV0ZZl3kd5NCEDcTRB6punQ1dr-djE-c_jcwYXvmb8YFV1l7ffrPg9Yj4OkQOCKF65xAX_teh3WK6ELBwB4NEhYt57UHcF5X3SVdplul8Fs9gEMmDTM5hdemPISt2XjQoKsRcN72JdGIyY9e8dSF6sd6ETdqBvjZ9NhmR7Rcl31RJTDZXBkZGzIK1nOFOjVOFQrfm2q-DLNelRIfOE4J3WwMdacSMZAUjLPUMUZliQ4ClnM70QpVp7VuMdTHEZ9L_MXzlBlqkSQc40yTOyrlpuZgmhxQtrkcSKjL9KAXNDYDn5g0HbVsduzJdS_doriGY8BnfaqIkP37Kz8HgA6leG2kZZHIWBkcD5B3XKYIgOFg6nVSUdR1DtU8yQ-MO_iN7inAuKjc%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ed2e890ac3934d8e8e1be503b4ca0c18&_e=cL4kJvodQgXoVASymHv1F98ri4HPXap7wgulVmKmZJjusI61yXTSHI8VJ1SOjPbmvM0cQ7XR7zakjA_d9evGCkZTorhknMAe904rV0ZZl3kd5NCEDcTRB6punQ1dr-djE-c_jcwYXvmb8YFV1l7ffrPg9Yj4OkQOCKF65xAX_teh3WK6ELBwB4NEhYt57UHcF5X3SVdplul8Fs9gEMmDTM5hdemPISt2XjQoKsRcN72JdGIyY9e8dSF6sd6ETdqBvjZ9NhmR7Rcl31RJTDZXBntlEi2LC2NBfm8D2qkyLFaSFhtBnJE4AyashokhsbVsfKZLLKhe1WYza7gn1brj_ybNOjIVzL2f6YAAP0nMhk-Bg3GbuR7Kww1qpFh5zYSdNv70ggJqmvvV2pr7U4NDpEKRinyO-kzsQkZ1usigU_49C2Dt8EM7yvhNBZ29tQs0cb-N4Me6HEZdiD_NA2tirPJDF-5HhFmYcfFPfxS1yRE%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ed2e890ac3934d8e8e1be503b4ca0c18&_e=cL4kJvodQgXoVASymHv1F98ri4HPXap7wgulVmKmZJjusI61yXTSHI8VJ1SOjPbmvM0cQ7XR7zakjA_d9evGCkZTorhknMAe904rV0ZZl3kd5NCEDcTRB6punQ1dr-djE-c_jcwYXvmb8YFV1l7ffrPg9Yj4OkQOCKF65xAX_teh3WK6ELBwB4NEhYt57UHcF5X3SVdplul8Fs9gEMmDTM5hdemPISt2XjQoKsRcN72JdGIyY9e8dSF6sd6ETdqBvjZ9NhmR7Rcl31RJTDZXBkOHgSseWhNFVDeRoBl0PxKz3zEomPg-FRsX5SZdyKaA6w3KkxkKpsdpyx7gEUoAnmi1VulkdIWk0rvIbSQnPQ4lmc-3tMUp5Pe-Hx_ThKWiAy47bUFHdM9TDcpeqEGvY1EVAEG2WBkc7J0qSfMBvNaVUXgHs3gAdgp9T0A5LKuX6WTeunHZCyud9GBG3oTpWo9ajvSXTffV4HPK3lxgUp4%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ed2e890ac3934d8e8e1be503b4ca0c18&_e=cL4kJvodQgXoVASymHv1F98ri4HPXap7wgulVmKmZJjusI61yXTSHI8VJ1SOjPbmvM0cQ7XR7zakjA_d9evGCkZTorhknMAe904rV0ZZl3kd5NCEDcTRB6punQ1dr-djE-c_jcwYXvmb8YFV1l7ffrPg9Yj4OkQOCKF65xAX_teh3WK6ELBwB4NEhYt57UHcF5X3SVdplul8Fs9gEMmDTM5hdemPISt2XjQoKsRcN72JdGIyY9e8dSF6sd6ETdqBvjZ9NhmR7Rcl31RJTDZXBv4oGMg0uJAs_dOj92HU7qVPVeGW7q8qLHVvJrmKWjJc2iQalroEaFe_H47H9vMezbWsnjdm0cs_gas3CwY9gbR1T6U9z2f38hKKThTpvr04TPIG-NaAyI7yhHymuIZRrPY5UmKtcfZRPYf23EYqQpRC-WLmQK593bf95f6V25WX8CbVPjH52GLvjKynUBjiROTkczOOEZVo0rVraMWl-Zc%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ed2e890ac3934d8e8e1be503b4ca0c18&_e=cL4kJvodQgXoVASymHv1F98ri4HPXap7wgulVmKmZJjusI61yXTSHI8VJ1SOjPbmvM0cQ7XR7zakjA_d9evGCkZTorhknMAe904rV0ZZl3kd5NCEDcTRB6punQ1dr-djE-c_jcwYXvmb8YFV1l7ffrPg9Yj4OkQOCKF65xAX_teh3WK6ELBwB4NEhYt57UHcF5X3SVdplul8Fs9gEMmDTM5hdemPISt2XjQoKsRcN72JdGIyY9e8dSF6sd6ETdqBvjZ9NhmR7Rcl31RJTDZXBn_ap7p5xvb1tQVaTZkIBu4XOmw-74bdKZWQ_RiFUaY39LpWnjUcpWrk_oYoHxO65GT8d_Z8tpoPIYgT1YD4h0dbRXX70bZPx3JlKmPgb007o9cFH19IOBheUdPzafJTBLUCRI3Azx35jIb6VgXXAQ6fKGxBZkBS6TatnvkxEnOqutsnRHKmqfdc5-po2GLwWRRvMGDbxriT1KpImNTJSaU%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ed2e890ac3934d8e8e1be503b4ca0c18&_e=cL4kJvodQgXoVASymHv1F98ri4HPXap7wgulVmKmZJjusI61yXTSHI8VJ1SOjPbmvM0cQ7XR7zakjA_d9evGCkZTorhknMAe904rV0ZZl3kd5NCEDcTRB6punQ1dr-djE-c_jcwYXvmb8YFV1l7ffrPg9Yj4OkQOCKF65xAX_teh3WK6ELBwB4NEhYt57UHcF5X3SVdplul8Fs9gEMmDTM5hdemPISt2XjQoKsRcN72JdGIyY9e8dSF6sd6ETdqBvjZ9NhmR7Rcl31RJTDZXBmBxxhzXb8krVGcAne3FfiX4rB8lz_wUXPKbQ6W_QgJH-0iP6lrL5Mr_c791O_NUpNSuomnCF-RdNwLOPhn9wzV2OEMM1S2K_FO77AyvlMtD_uVGKvz2nBw5t2mqxTcIw36nnWYAYDT85JcQ9IxUAzc04jsPdSiWUCD9zHMY-Q72ZGVpZtbXa0khmYFE9xXzBSnJld_HavA4R1P24-CQbNY%3D)

clean_body: To put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Not too long ago, Latinos were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Latino,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Latina Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

name: 9-hour-deadline@dccc.org
subject: calling on 4 Democrats from your area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | _**We asked once.
We asked twice.
We have to ask one last time. **_

**[We know you've heard from us a lot \-- but that's how absolutely critical tonight's Mid Month deadline is. Republicans have shattered FIVE fundraising goals in a row -- and as of 3:3Opm, we're still at risk of being outraised again. So we're calling on 2,5OO Democrats to chip in $3 to close the gap, OUTRAISE Republicans, and STOP them from defeating our House Majority. Will you rush $3 to protect our House Democrats? >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)**

If we don't close this budget gap in these final nine hours, our Congressional Majorities will be in perilous danger of falling to Republicans.

**That 's why we're calling on grassroots Democrats everywhere (including your area) to step up, chip in, and defend our House Majority.**
| [MID MONTH DEADLINE: ](https://links.e.dccc.)[MIDNIGHT](https://links.e.dccc.)
[NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

There is no easy way to say this:

If we fail to close this budget gap, we could be forced to kiss our House Majority and all of our progress goodbye.

**So we 're asking 2,5OO Democrats step up in time to help us OUTRAISE Republicans, PROTECT our Majorities, and hand Republicans a STUNNING rebuke. **

****[So can we count on you to rush $3 in these final nine hours to protect our House Democrats, defend our House Majority and defeat House Republicans?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)****

name: =?utf-8?Q?KTBBH=20Pac=20via=20royerforva.com?=
subject: Our rural voters need real representation
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
Believe it or not, there are a lot of progressives in rural Virginia. Let's help them out! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2ae566486c78/our-rural-voters-need-real-representation?e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=d1b3106606&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | Derek-

To some folks in the suburban and urban areas of Virginia, it may surprise you to know that there are tons of voters who would vote for Democrats and Progressives if given the right platform. One of those people who are pushing for economic justice for rural Virginians is Jennifer Kitchen.
[Progressives can push issues and win in rural Virginia](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=937a0667de&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=713f1ab495&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [Check Out the Joint Fundraising Page Here](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ef1f5abdde&e=76fc145c69)
Now it's no secret that Democrats are having a hard time in rural VA and they need our help. But what you may not know is that there are a lot of progressive voters and candidates down there as well. [Bernie Sanders even won several different areas out in Rural Virginia during the Presidential Primaries](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=3c2a7d9477&e=76fc145c69) in 2016 and 2020.

Our fellow Virginias out in the Valley are hurting too. Far travel times to Medical Centers, lack of connectivity due to lack of rural broadband, intrusive pipeline construction, and the loss of jobs have decimated our once thriving Shenandoah Valley. But if we have the right people in office, we can see affordable and accessible healthcare, rural broadband connectivity, mass transit, sustainable agriculture, economic justice, environmental justice, and jobs return to places like Staunton and Waynesboro.

Born and raised in the Shenandoah Valley, Jenni knows what it takes to represent this area and we know the votes are out there. We just have to make sure Jennifer and her "Kitchen Cabinet" can blast their messge out to as many people in the 25th as always. [Can you help us do that by chipping in $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=4562c32f28&e=76fc145c69)?
---
| Keep movin' forward,
Matt

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=46d209280d&e=76fc145c69 "DONATE NOW")
---
| _KTBBH takes its initials from the late great Henry Howell who said he would "Keep the Big Boys Honest." That's what Progressives need to do now in the Commonwealth of Virginia. We rely solely on everyday donors like you to make sure that we support elected officials who only answer to you, the people. [Consider helping out our cause by donating anything you can afford now. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=251b191c27&e=76fc145c69)_
---
| | | | | | | [](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9d0cd25a3a&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=b96a638ae7&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ecd27eb219&e=76fc145c69)
---

---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=bf3c25df6e&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC

Our Mailing Address is:
PO Box 101547
Arlington, VA 22210

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=045cfb7e8f&e=76fc145c69&c=446c4e251a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=045cfb7e8f&e=76fc145c69&c=446c4e251a).

**But last week, we fell $1,138 short of our mid-month goal.** And unfortunately, if we continue to fall short of our projections, Cawthorn could bury our campaign.

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dbd68690d01f413082a746e7c014f4b0&_e=CPwwQtoO3xSfWUBHWosZe3zEvTMNK0mVotBX7TCqg6n26XfBrhJjFT8jJ4IwSqI1vL0CjKIURdnsw_0lJzTfnS0L_Cd93uC_R-kbs6XWlf5FsSSXzZRquSuCAx8P6KGk4NkI7wq5r1V0j5erCkM6JQEmgbaNOCatRCDJDoX8BAvHlp6BmsoNE2cZ8o1Hjt1H_QIsdlWSvfwfNIlQc1R78SSjy-LvPULiUOZlzNpA-Owki7ysnntk-mJNGt-jV0GTErgm2YMqiOzyBfRnemzC7U9ByytTAFFcAXphBUmHSsyzP1QRl4ze9EIMvHYPqR2oh7ckHI8AM8yHsSxzJsWcDd055cm7RJ1GKFUhmuUJXpsHpikIznkVb5dw_05niPNfKr6otFzzaA2Vlh9BkTUgR5N_R0HuKwmmVKD-BqkJ7SfOlE1Tnu-FZFZNzc3_M_Sdv5Tdt6ZOtj48sOfOApou_q5CmT6GJkgV6qnQkH1sDo3uhj-WchtQgN74_ChatZkZYCJCYDoIEOD-KGmc9HkhXg%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dbd68690d01f413082a746e7c014f4b0&_e=CPwwQtoO3xSfWUBHWosZe3zEvTMNK0mVotBX7TCqg6n26XfBrhJjFT8jJ4IwSqI1vL0CjKIURdnsw_0lJzTfnS0L_Cd93uC_R-kbs6XWlf5FsSSXzZRquSuCAx8P6KGk4NkI7wq5r1V0j5erCkM6JQEmgbaNOCatRCDJDoX8BAvHlp6BmsoNE2cZ8o1Hjt1H_QIsdlWSvfwfNIlQc1R78SSjy-LvPULiUOZlzNpA-Owki7ysnntk-mJNGt-jV0GTErgm2YMqiOzyBfRnemzC7U9ByytTAFFcAXphBUmHSsyzP1QRl4ze9EIMvHYPqR2oClbVSj6nzuglWP1tzOdlRFRLJCHR8iM0l5gAh-10Y3gkElspjNVmzxZuisww4jckULug-67Dj8NvfCz7xcL7cQZ-5JDKSE7zM_8cN6xrni9SIQYFOHvzuH0wsoWzaci2iwqNem6eonCRzOCNfIA5069PNa1Hys1ZbKQM2zh-kIDKg2VOmonDdH76IFPkZLRuHOZBE7f13wBjm9RAHjZseg%3D%3D)** _

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 17TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dbd68690d01f413082a746e7c014f4b0&_e=CPwwQtoO3xSfWUBHWosZe3zEvTMNK0mVotBX7TCqg6n26XfBrhJjFT8jJ4IwSqI1vL0CjKIURdnsw_0lJzTfnS0L_Cd93uC_R-kbs6XWlf5FsSSXzZRquSuCAx8P6KGk4NkI7wq5r1V0j5erCkM6JQEmgbaNOCatRCDJDoX8BAvHlp6BmsoNE2cZ8o1Hjt1H_QIsdlWSvfwfNIlQc1R78SSjy-LvPULiUOZlzNpA-Owki7ysnntk-mJNGt-jV0GTErgm2YMqiOzyBfRnemzC7U9ByytTAFFcAXphBUmHSsyzP1QRl4ze9EIMvHYPqR2oCwUw91C-n3WHgfc4QjcqPgIt_pDUVc1U8E6li0xZpfhZWnle9nfOJOmtf5SEU5-T4RKr7EDE0-wI2F2ro4IJtEhWv2Q5CCI3MILA05CyKCQSAFZQU7Th4xTVoXY8UrUNZ1HHuHKHXGkZy9hxVKsr1ou7cHep24fawqFEfLcGW6yNzKWtxqMIdXmELKAiFtMsEEUFDsc4qkNmYdzYU9DxEA%3D%3D)

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dbd68690d01f413082a746e7c014f4b0&_e=CPwwQtoO3xSfWUBHWosZe3zEvTMNK0mVotBX7TCqg6n26XfBrhJjFT8jJ4IwSqI1vL0CjKIURdnsw_0lJzTfnS0L_Cd93uC_R-kbs6XWlf5FsSSXzZRquSuCAx8P6KGk4NkI7wq5r1V0j5erCkM6JQEmgbaNOCatRCDJDoX8BAvHlp6BmsoNE2cZ8o1Hjt1H_QIsdlWSvfwfNIlQc1R78SSjy-LvPULiUOZlzNpA-Owki7ysnntk-mJNGt-jV0GTErgm2YMqiOzyBfRnemzC7U9ByytTAFFcAXphBUmHSsyzP1QRl4ze9EIMvHYPqR2oLIRz3ASt1_y4n5hidgg963u6bxhNpWW_ZuFY3RUrR5xOtCTEyJwx1AZk3NGNr1WE7Hjk7y1z-UCmvhOAKXGDYhY8tE7lMBRY7cEGMnti1KxT0UKaiMQ0ox2dc3IX2fftPHsKlFoMfk3QFM-BqrHRAYHPQ-13CdqUJ1HX_IxwIkuneCS6QOqVyqqBi20m-3CwhV2amXAPJIk_wbXYR9zXig%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: McConnell’s handpicked candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
If I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvRbNUclc6g0qk42Iexh5EZYuHAx7WLu1QwO5bysB22XAIgNQdoy3XKg-etG3c1jb4QHCeCcn2PoSgcA2g65yIPUgX_M_1HkHDdJP4Kbpn7UG_3KhLQOam_TODZxYKG4sbHompmbXxS89gbb1Dh7kS9LruofwSFtErnDIFHnrghhiW0T2jBXKRFCct7__2yVRTp9O3_qAq3wQi5z3YcdFnmjSKF9K1h-t0Bf_3DZGQBxIhc_Ic7LnKU6e_a7jywrniUXFdR46LgA7zHcrY9yVBy1es8ORVXg8pyyNfHNJf3Z/3ej/Pbbyp6gjSxe_ab4OYgdcLw/h0/2Nu3mo884ep2P1a2vX_AhAolcZjS2C7Su7Frwiayav4) Derek,

I’m Catherine Cortez Masto, and I proudly represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate. Last election cycle, I worked tirelessly to defeat Mitch McConnell and help flip the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Senate Democrats’ campaign arm. Now, Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge.

In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a $25 donation between my campaign and Common Good VA to defend our hard-won Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvRbNUclc6g0qk42Iexh5EZ_l6I2f4MPU_7O3qUCqUm2F1X0J0JBregwSxGiBqf7_7eK8QS-UbF54TzN2xEWJ0pWl7fUiTsxj_irCu2KjZgi3_S_qGjramI62-1ZZfv3dWm1XVRkHz7p80AD72rrCYrDByWiZKkW2dPlABgLW9iuGzMpiM-PKpTLjRG3MUshGicbqLOOiSynS3RtF3vbGoR0AXKtbrrsAvwH3XTlDK8BoKv6HrSCgvl_VX7P_MuT3psz8I_nnHDPfWqH4FpgIufehmFud4AOj0Y_wEjDLMFC/3ej/Pbbyp6gjSxe_ab4OYgdcLw/h1/DEtvcFYNWIoDNjnGD04cJBdHblRhrSnN2Jq7xl72GKM)** I hope you’ll let me explain – because if I lose this race, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.

I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know: **Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate has just _officially_ announced his campaign to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.**

CNN is reporting that my Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip and _The Cook Political Report_ just shifted this race in Republicans’ favor. Donald Trump nearly flipped Nevada in 2020, and the GOP and outside groups have already spent nearly $1 million this year to defeat me. And that was all _before_ my opponent launched his campaign.

**That’s why my campaign just launched an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight. name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: Mandatory COVID Vaccines?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=4a8042d193af4aeb950ac59b993061a9&_t=EsKlsYXA2OHB4jJjdnbnR069Lj-4PwxgN3ESqBGkO5NKOexyL-uveSBBXTjJM4D7b7Hf6JjOzuvDsdobXWv_gLxmJ8aST2DN3UJS3f8RQFR31UoxHX5OyQg083Hda7gu6A_lAYkXTeKafTtxxqCFztjSJDxFozYWVUObzjlFmd4%3D)

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4a8042d193af4aeb950ac59b993061a9&_e=m6MgCW5bdATaTI-Xk8NevamGsXuNQAq3IuRVNH_RojuGJJGOTg2rvW9hK6VwfkUCnALDAtaP7WYkdtd76QhZN1TAk1x68kyZsA8c7xbanulk2ZmJUyzW7SvxFp1mnBrGOyyUFcCnJtTOSUyssI1mlz-kT3WUk9l2V0eXnGOnc774Qm_lImHp-na8HzScJD8ER3sW-JydVQIFPbhpn8w5I_UgIp7SGxdTgegOay72onauaMe8CiVbdLL6yB4PbQui-dMH8tpY-KDd8IwuFpC1zNzm1Fh5EjHRjHnK3P_DIARebWTCDLcyD_RVzHM53uG6xeSy4H__pSAonyveN55wRR71ZYCBGREmA6yhDGROgcgukvG7F1JDprHwgvwpglTeUVOL9ExCdcHVCixG5sr-xBOD9n0lB8YuBPOPqDmYMhveeKaZufZCUzaHbh-hEnyD2u0OmKBEkOid0CGoPCajfqPpm5aEYZxEn7wWvvbS-xVRKpwE0tR4gGJzDYmWSsn9Lastlf2oGpyCDk4n4wbcnQ%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4a8042d193af4aeb950ac59b993061a9&_e=m6MgCW5bdATaTI-Xk8NevamGsXuNQAq3IuRVNH_RojuGJJGOTg2rvW9hK6VwfkUCnALDAtaP7WYkdtd76QhZN1TAk1x68kyZsA8c7xbanulk2ZmJUyzW7SvxFp1mnBrGOyyUFcCnJtTOSUyssI1mlz-kT3WUk9l2V0eXnGOnc774Qm_lImHp-na8HzScJD8ER3sW-JydVQIFPbhpn8w5I_UgIp7SGxdTgegOay72onauaMe8CiVbdLL6yB4PbQui-dMH8tpY-KDd8IwuFpC1zNzm1Fh5EjHRjHnK3P_DIARebWTCDLcyD_RVzHM53uG6xL2z3TJNYWGiHWKI2me4GJbImhnp9VEo08saNojwhi9FDlFOE5mZPcaFqUmXALM5IXNh5xPZfaPvi5u6a1e-RkY0FcJKPot2HItnkQAQzMjullzl2gBMfT5HnbdoSd78AtQmZ_roSLkRj7gjgpChlYrJGn9jGerPhkHeN8OwmqeIyNn0u4NePPMpe9NFV2s5LPXQpUxH2OMjcvUvqowuag%3D%3D)**
